struct  IntegrationEntry

class  Integrator

class  IntervalUnion

struct  LambertWPattern

class  RelationStore

struct  SolveOptions

class  Solver

class  SubstitutionStrategy

struct  SymbolicPolyCoeff

class  TableLookupStrategy

类型定义

using MatchMap = std::unordered_map< std::string, SymbolicExpr >
 匹配结果映射，通配符名称 → 绑定的表达式
 
using Monomial = std::vector< int >
 单项式类型，以整数向量表示各变量的指数
 

枚举

enum class  Boundedness { Bounded , Unbounded , Unknown }
 Boundedness classification for symbols. 更多...
 
enum class  Domain {
  Complex , Real , Rational , Integer ,
  Natural , PositiveInt
}
 Mathematical domain hierarchy (least specific → most specific). Complex ⊃ Real ⊃ Rational ⊃ Integer ⊃ Natural ⊃ PositiveInt 更多...
 
enum class  InequalityType { GreaterThan , GreaterEqual , LessThan , LessEqual }
 不等式类型 更多...
 
enum class  MonomialOrderType { Lex , GrevLex , DegLex , DegRevLex }
 单项式序的类型枚举 更多...
 
enum class  Parity { Even , Odd , Unknown }
 Integer parity classification. 更多...
 
enum class  Sign {
  Positive , Negative , NonNegative , NonPositive ,
  Zero , NonZero
}
 Sign classification for symbols and expressions. 更多...
 
enum class  SolveStrategy {

  RootOf
}

◆ lamina::SolveOptions

struct lamina::SolveOptions

方程求解选项，控制数值求解行为和结果形式。

在文件 solve_strategies.hpp 第 15 行定义.

lamina::SolveOptions 的协作图:
类成员
bool allow_numeric = false 是否允许数值求解
bool has_initial_guess = false 是否指定了初始猜测值
lmmc_real_t initial_guess = 0.0 数值迭代初始猜测值
int max_newton_iterations = 100 Newton 迭代最大次数
int max_roots = -1 最大返回根数，-1 表示不限制
bool return_rootof = true 无闭式解时是否返回 RootOf 表达式
lmmc_real_t tolerance = 1e-12 收敛容差

◆ Boundedness

strong

Boundedness classification for symbols.

枚举值
Bounded 

Symbol has finite bounds

Unbounded 

Symbol is unbounded

Unknown 

Boundedness not determined

42 {
43 Bounded, ///< Symbol has finite bounds
44 Unbounded, ///< Symbol is unbounded
45 Unknown ///< Boundedness not determined
46};
lamina::Parity::Unknown
@ Unknown
Parity not determined
lamina::Boundedness::Unbounded
@ Unbounded
Symbol is unbounded
lamina::Boundedness::Bounded
@ Bounded
Symbol has finite bounds

◆ Domain

enum class lamina::Domain
strong

Mathematical domain hierarchy (least specific → most specific). Complex ⊃ Real ⊃ Rational ⊃ Integer ⊃ Natural ⊃ PositiveInt

枚举值
Complex 

Complex numbers (default, least specific)

Real 

Real numbers

Rational 

Rational numbers

Integer 

Integers

Natural 

Non-negative integers (0, 1, 2, ...)

PositiveInt 

Positive integers (1, 2, 3, ...)

17 Real, ///< Real numbers
18 Rational, ///< Rational numbers

20 Natural, ///< Non-negative integers (0, 1, 2, ...)
21 PositiveInt ///< Positive integers (1, 2, 3, ...)
22};

精确有理数类，以 BigInt 分子/分母表示，构造时自动约分

strong

求解策略枚举，标识所使用的求解方法。

39};

◆ bisection()

std::optional< NumericRoot > lamina::bisection ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  f,
const std::string &  var,
lmmc_real_t  lo,
lmmc_real_t  hi,
const SolveOptions &  opts 
)

二分法求根。

参数
f目标函数表达式
var求解变量名
lo区间下界（要求 f(lo) 与 f(hi) 异号）
hi区间上界
opts求解选项
返回
收敛时返回数值根，否则返回 nullopt

在文件 newton_raphson.cpp 第 190 行定义.

196{
197
198 lmmc_real_t f_lo = f->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(lo))->to_numeric();
199 lmmc_real_t f_hi = f->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(hi))->to_numeric();
200
201 if (std::abs(f_lo) < opts.tolerance) {
202 return NumericRoot{lo, std::abs(f_lo), 0};
203 }
204 if (std::abs(f_hi) < opts.tolerance) {
205 return NumericRoot{hi, std::abs(f_hi), 0};
206 }
207
208 if (f_lo * f_hi > 0) {
209 return std::nullopt;
210 }
211
212 int max_iter = opts.max_newton_iterations * 3;
213 for (int i = 1; i <= max_iter; ++i) {
214 lmmc_real_t mid = (lo + hi) * 0.5;
215 lmmc_real_t f_mid = f->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(mid))->to_numeric();
216
217 if (std::abs(f_mid) < opts.tolerance) {
218 return NumericRoot{mid, std::abs(f_mid), i};
219 }
220
221 if (std::abs(hi - lo) < opts.tolerance) {
222 return NumericRoot{mid, std::abs(f_mid), i};
223 }
224
225 if (f_lo * f_mid < 0) {
226 hi = mid;
227 f_hi = f_mid;
228 } else {
229 lo = mid;
230 f_lo = f_mid;
231 }
232 }
233
234 lmmc_real_t mid = (lo + hi) * 0.5;
235 lmmc_real_t f_mid = f->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(mid))->to_numeric();
236 if (std::abs(f_mid) < opts.tolerance * 1000) {
237 return NumericRoot{mid, std::abs(f_mid), max_iter};
238 }
239 return std::nullopt;
240}

static

在文件 interval.cpp 第 229 行定义.

229 {
230
231 if (a.upper.is_pos_infinity) return true;
232 if (b.lower.is_neg_infinity) return true;
233
234 if (a.upper.is_neg_infinity || b.lower.is_pos_infinity) return false;
235
236 // If either side is symbolic we cannot prove the intervals are adjacent
237 // or overlapping numerically; refuse to merge.
238 if (!endpoint_is_numeric(a.upper) || !endpoint_is_numeric(b.lower)) {
239 return false;
240 }
241
242 double au = endpoint_numeric_value(a.upper);
243 double bl = endpoint_numeric_value(b.lower);
244
245 if (au > bl) return true;
246 if (au == bl) {
247
248 return !a.upper.is_open || !b.lower.is_open;
249 }
250 return false;
251}

◆ cauchy_bound()

static Rational lamina::cauchy_bound ( const Polynomial< Rational > &  poly)
static

在文件 newton_raphson.cpp 第 66 行定义.

66 {
67 if (poly.degree() <= 0) return Rational(1);
68
69 Rational lc = poly.lead_coeff();
70 Rational max_ratio(0);
71
72 for (int i = 0; i < poly.degree(); ++i) {
73 Rational coeff = poly.coeffs[i];
74 if (coeff.is_zero()) continue;
75 Rational ratio = coeff.abs() / lc.abs();
76 if (ratio > max_ratio) {
77 max_ratio = ratio;
78 }
79 }
80
81 return Rational(1) + max_ratio;
82}

◆ collect_denominator_factors()

static bool lamina::collect_denominator_factors ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  node,
std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > > &  den_factors,
std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > &  den_constraints 
)
static

在文件 solver.cpp 第 235 行定义.

239 {
240 if (!node) return false;
241
242 if (std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(node) || std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(node)) {
243 return true;
244 }
245
246 if (auto add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(node)) {
247 for (const auto& op : add->operands) {
248 if (!collect_denominator_factors(op, den_factors, den_constraints)) return false;
249 }
250 return true;
251 }
252
253 if (auto mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(node)) {
254 for (const auto& op : mul->operands) {
255 if (!collect_denominator_factors(op, den_factors, den_constraints)) return false;
256 }
257 return true;
258 }
259
260 if (auto pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(node)) {
261 long long exp = 0;
262 if (!get_integer_value(pow->exponent, exp)) return false;
263
264 if (exp < 0) {
265 if (!is_polynomial_node(pow->base)) return false;
266 long long k = -exp;
267 if (k == 1) {
268 den_factors.push_back(pow->base);
269 } else {
270 den_factors.push_back(SymbolicFactory::create_power(pow->base, SymbolicFactory::create_number(BigInt(k))));
271 }
272 den_constraints.push_back(std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(pow->base));
273 return true;
274 }
275
276 if (!collect_denominator_factors(pow->base, den_factors, den_constraints)) return false;
277 return true;
278 }
279
280 if (auto func = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(node)) {
281 for (const auto& arg : func->arguments) {
282 if (!collect_denominator_factors(arg, den_factors, den_constraints)) return false;
283 }
284 return true;
285 }
286
287 return false;
288}

◆ collect_power_exponents()

static std::vector< int > lamina::collect_power_exponents ( const RelationStore &  store,
const std::string &  lhs_name,
const std::string &  rhs_name 
)
static

Helper: collect positive integer exponents that appear in PowerNode expressions within the RelationStore involving the given variable names.

在文件 inference_engine.cpp 第 1384 行定义.

1386 {
1387 std::unordered_set<int> exponents;
1388
1389 auto check_node = [&](const std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>& node) {
1390 if (!node) return;
1391 auto pow_node = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(node);
1392 if (!pow_node) return;
1393
1394 // Check if the base is one of our variables
1395 auto base_var = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(pow_node->base);
1396 if (!base_var) return;
1397 if (base_var->name != lhs_name && base_var->name != rhs_name) return;
1398
1399 // Check if the exponent is a positive integer
1400 auto exp_num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(pow_node->exponent);
1401 if (!exp_num) return;
1402 if (!is_positive_integer_number(*exp_num)) return;
1403
1404 // Extract the integer value
1405 int n = 0;
1406 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(exp_num->value)) {
1407 const auto& b = std::get<BigInt>(exp_num->value);
1408 // Only consider small exponents to avoid explosion
1409 if (b > BigInt(100)) return;
1410 n = static_cast<int>(b.IsNegative() ? 0 : b.is_zero() ? 0 : std::stoi(b.to_string()));
1411 } else if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(exp_num->value)) {
1412 BigInt num_val = std::get<Rational>(exp_num->value).get_numerator();
1413 if (num_val > BigInt(100)) return;
1414 n = static_cast<int>(std::stoi(num_val.to_string()));
1415 } else {
1416 double v = std::get<lmmc_real_t>(exp_num->value);
1417 if (v <= 0.0 || v > 100.0 || v != std::floor(v)) return;
1418 n = static_cast<int>(v);
1419 }
1420
1421 if (n > 0) {
1422 exponents.insert(n);
1423 }
1424 };
1425
1426 // Scan all relations in the store for PowerNode expressions
1427 for (const auto& rel : store.get_relations()) {
1428 check_node(rel.lhs.root);
1429 check_node(rel.rhs.root);
1430 }
1431
1432 return std::vector<int>(exponents.begin(), exponents.end());
1433}

static void lamina::collect_transcendental_subexprs ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  node,

)
static

在文件 solve_transcendental.cpp 第 739 行定义.

742 {
743
744 if (!node) return;
745
746 if (auto func = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(node)) {
747 if (func->arguments.size() == 1 && depends_on_var(func->arguments[0], var)) {
748 auto ft = func->type;
749 if (ft == FunctionNode::FuncType::Exp ||
750 ft == FunctionNode::FuncType::Sin ||
751 ft == FunctionNode::FuncType::Cos ||
752 ft == FunctionNode::FuncType::Tan) {
753 candidates.push_back(std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(node));
754 }
755 }
756
757 for (auto& arg : func->arguments) {
758 collect_transcendental_subexprs(arg, var, candidates);
759 }
760 return;
761 }
762
763 if (auto pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(node)) {
764 if (depends_on_var(pow->base, var) && !depends_on_var(pow->exponent, var)) {
765 if (auto exp_num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(pow->exponent)) {
766 int e_val = 0;
767 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(exp_num->value))
768 e_val = std::get<BigInt>(exp_num->value).to_int();
769 else if (std::holds_alternative<double>(exp_num->value))
770 e_val = (int)std::get<double>(exp_num->value);
771 else if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(exp_num->value))
772 e_val = (int)std::get<Rational>(exp_num->value).to_double();
773
774 if (e_val >= 2) {
775
776 auto base_expr = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(pow->base);
777 candidates.push_back(base_expr);
778 }
779 }
780 }
781
782 collect_transcendental_subexprs(pow->base, var, candidates);
783 collect_transcendental_subexprs(pow->exponent, var, candidates);
784 return;
785 }
786
787 if (auto add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(node)) {
788 for (auto& op : add->operands) {
789 collect_transcendental_subexprs(op, var, candidates);
790 }
791 return;
792 }
793
794 if (auto mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(node)) {
795 for (auto& op : mul->operands) {
796 collect_transcendental_subexprs(op, var, candidates);
797 }
798 return;
799 }
800}

◆ compare_endpoints_lower()

static int lamina::compare_endpoints_lower ( const Endpoint &  a,
const Endpoint &  b 
)
static

在文件 interval.cpp 第 151 行定义.

151 {
152
153 if (a.is_neg_infinity && b.is_neg_infinity) return 0;
154 if (a.is_neg_infinity) return -1;
155 if (b.is_neg_infinity) return 1;
156
157 if (a.is_pos_infinity && b.is_pos_infinity) return 0;
158 if (a.is_pos_infinity) return 1;
159 if (b.is_pos_infinity) return -1;
160
161 bool a_num = endpoint_is_numeric(a);
162 bool b_num = endpoint_is_numeric(b);
163 if (!a_num || !b_num) {
164 // 不要用 to_string() 给符号端点造伪数值序——后续 intersect()/normalize()
165 // 会把这里的返回值当成真实大小关系，进而把不可比的端点错误合并。
166 // 这里只在两侧"结构相等"时返回 0；否则用 SymbolicNode::compare 给出
167 // 一个确定但纯结构性的 tie-breaker，仅用于 std::sort 的严格弱序需求。
168 if (a_num) return -1;
169 if (b_num) return 1;
170 if (a.value && b.value && a.value->root && b.value->root) {
171 int c = a.value->root->compare(*b.value->root);
172 if (c != 0) return c;
173 } else if (a.value != b.value) {
174 return (a.value < b.value) ? -1 : 1;
175 }
176 if (a.is_open && !b.is_open) return 1;
177 if (!a.is_open && b.is_open) return -1;
178 return 0;
179 }
180
181 double va = endpoint_numeric_value(a);
182 double vb = endpoint_numeric_value(b);
183
184 if (va < vb) return -1;
185 if (va > vb) return 1;
186
187 if (a.is_open && !b.is_open) return 1;
188 if (!a.is_open && b.is_open) return -1;
189 return 0;
190}

static int lamina::compare_endpoints_upper ( const Endpoint &  a,
const Endpoint &  b 
)
static

在文件 interval.cpp 第 192 行定义.

192 {
193 if (a.is_pos_infinity && b.is_pos_infinity) return 0;
194 if (a.is_pos_infinity) return 1;
195 if (b.is_pos_infinity) return -1;
196
197 if (a.is_neg_infinity && b.is_neg_infinity) return 0;
198 if (a.is_neg_infinity) return -1;
199 if (b.is_neg_infinity) return 1;
200
201 bool a_num = endpoint_is_numeric(a);
202 bool b_num = endpoint_is_numeric(b);
203 if (!a_num || !b_num) {
204 // 同 lower 比较：避免 to_string 造伪序，仅用结构性 compare 维持稳定排序。
205 if (a_num) return -1;
206 if (b_num) return 1;
207 if (a.value && b.value && a.value->root && b.value->root) {
208 int c = a.value->root->compare(*b.value->root);
209 if (c != 0) return c;
210 } else if (a.value != b.value) {
211 return (a.value < b.value) ? -1 : 1;
212 }
213 if (!a.is_open && b.is_open) return 1;
214 if (a.is_open && !b.is_open) return -1;
215 return 0;
216 }
217
218 double va = endpoint_numeric_value(a);
219 double vb = endpoint_numeric_value(b);
220
221 if (va < vb) return -1;
222 if (va > vb) return 1;
223
224 if (!a.is_open && b.is_open) return 1;
225 if (a.is_open && !b.is_open) return -1;
226 return 0;
227}

◆ compute_determinant()

static std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > lamina::compute_determinant ( const std::vector< std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > > &  matrix,
size_t  n 
)
static

在文件 parametric_solver.cpp 第 388 行定义.

391{
392 if (n == 0) return SymbolicExpr::number(0);
393 if (n == 1) return matrix[0][0];
394
395 if (n == 2) {
396 auto ad = SymbolicExpr::multiply(matrix[0][0], matrix[1][1]);
397 auto bc = SymbolicExpr::multiply(matrix[0][1], matrix[1][0]);
398
399 auto neg_bc = SymbolicExpr::multiply(bc, SymbolicExpr::number(-1));
400 return SymbolicExpr::add(ad, neg_bc)->simplify();
401 }
402
403 if (n == 3) {
404
405 auto a = matrix[0][0], b = matrix[0][1], c = matrix[0][2];
406 auto d = matrix[1][0], e = matrix[1][1], f = matrix[1][2];
407 auto g = matrix[2][0], h = matrix[2][1], i = matrix[2][2];
408
409 auto ei = SymbolicExpr::multiply(e, i);
410 auto fh = SymbolicExpr::multiply(f, h);
411 auto ei_fh = SymbolicExpr::add(ei, SymbolicExpr::multiply(fh, SymbolicExpr::number(-1)));
412
413 auto di = SymbolicExpr::multiply(d, i);
414 auto fg = SymbolicExpr::multiply(f, g);
415 auto di_fg = SymbolicExpr::add(di, SymbolicExpr::multiply(fg, SymbolicExpr::number(-1)));
416
417 auto dh = SymbolicExpr::multiply(d, h);
418 auto eg = SymbolicExpr::multiply(e, g);
419 auto dh_eg = SymbolicExpr::add(dh, SymbolicExpr::multiply(eg, SymbolicExpr::number(-1)));
420
421 auto term1 = SymbolicExpr::multiply(a, ei_fh);
422 auto term2 = SymbolicExpr::multiply(b, di_fg);
423 auto term3 = SymbolicExpr::multiply(c, dh_eg);
424
425 auto neg_term2 = SymbolicExpr::multiply(term2, SymbolicExpr::number(-1));
426 auto sum12 = SymbolicExpr::add(term1, neg_term2);
427 return SymbolicExpr::add(sum12, term3)->simplify();
428 }
429
430 auto det = SymbolicExpr::number(0);
431 for (size_t j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
432
433 std::vector<std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>>> minor(n - 1, std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>>(n - 1));
434 for (size_t row = 1; row < n; ++row) {
435 size_t minor_col = 0;
436 for (size_t col = 0; col < n; ++col) {
437 if (col == j) continue;
438 minor[row - 1][minor_col] = matrix[row][col];
439 minor_col++;
440 }
441 }
442
443 auto cofactor = compute_determinant(minor, n - 1);
444 auto term = SymbolicExpr::multiply(matrix[0][j], cofactor);
445
446 if (j % 2 == 0) {
447 det = SymbolicExpr::add(det, term);
448 } else {
449 det = SymbolicExpr::add(det, SymbolicExpr::multiply(term, SymbolicExpr::number(-1)));
450 }
451 }
452 return det->simplify();
453}
lamina::compute_determinant

◆ convert_to_rational_poly()

static bool lamina::convert_to_rational_poly ( const Polynomial< SymbolicPolyCoeff > &  sym_poly,
Polynomial< Rational > &  out_poly 
)
static

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 687 行定义.

690{
691 out_poly = Polynomial<Rational>(sym_poly.variable_name);
692 out_poly.coeffs.resize(sym_poly.coeffs.size(), Rational(0));
693
694 for (size_t i = 0; i < sym_poly.coeffs.size(); ++i) {
695 auto coeff_expr = sym_poly.coeffs[i].val;
696 if (!coeff_expr) {
697 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational(0);
698 continue;
699 }
700
701 auto simplified = coeff_expr->simplify();
702
703 if (simplified->root) {
704 struct VarCheck : public SymbolicVisitor {
705 bool found = false;
706 void visit(NumberNode&) override {}
707 void visit(VariableNode&) override { found = true; }
708 void visit(AddNode& n) override { for (auto& op : n.operands) { if (found) return; op->accept(*this); } }
709 void visit(MultiplyNode& n) override { for (auto& op : n.operands) { if (found) return; op->accept(*this); } }
710 void visit(PowerNode& n) override { n.base->accept(*this); if (!found) n.exponent->accept(*this); }
711 void visit(FunctionNode& n) override { for (auto& arg : n.arguments) { if (found) return; arg->accept(*this); } }
712 void visit(MatrixNode&) override {}
713 } checker;
714 simplified->root->accept(checker);
715 if (checker.found) return false;
716 }
717
718 if (auto num_node = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(simplified->root)) {
719 if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(num_node->value)) {
720 out_poly.coeffs[i] = std::get<Rational>(num_node->value);
721 } else if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(num_node->value)) {
722 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational(std::get<BigInt>(num_node->value));
723 } else {
724 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational::from_double(std::get<double>(num_node->value));
725 }
726 } else if (simplified->is_zero()) {
727 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational(0);
728 } else if (simplified->is_one()) {
729 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational(1);
730 } else {
731
732 double val = simplified->to_numeric();
733 if (std::isnan(val) || std::isinf(val)) {
734 return false;
735 }
736 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational::from_double(val);
737 }
738 }
739
740 out_poly.trim();
741 return true;
742}
AddNode
加法节点，表示多个操作数的求和。

FunctionNode

◆ count_sign_changes()

static int lamina::count_sign_changes ( const std::vector< Rational > &  values)

在文件 newton_raphson.cpp 第 8 行定义.

8 {
9 int changes = 0;
10 int last_sign = 0;
11
12 for (const auto& v : values) {
13 if (v.is_zero()) continue;
14
15 int current_sign = (v > Rational(0)) ? 1 : -1;
16 if (last_sign != 0 && current_sign != last_sign) {
17 ++changes;
18 }
19 last_sign = current_sign;
20 }
21 return changes;
22}

r1第一个余数
m1第一个模数
r2第二个余数
m2第二个模数
返回
pair(合并余数, 合并模数 m1*m2)
异常
std::domain_error若模数不互素

在文件 modular_arithmetic.hpp 第 209 行定义.

210 {
211 int64_t s, t;
212 int64_t g = extended_gcd(m1, m2, s, t);
213 if (g != 1) {
214 throw std::domain_error("crt(): moduli must be coprime");
215 }
216
217 int64_t M = m1 * m2;
218 int64_t diff = ((r2 - r1) % m2 + m2) % m2;
219
220 int64_t s_mod = ((s % m2) + m2) % m2;
221
222 uint64_t q_unused;
223 uint64_t factor = lmmp_mulmod_ulong_(
224 static_cast<uint64_t>(s_mod),
225 static_cast<uint64_t>(diff),
226 static_cast<uint64_t>(m2), &q_unused);
227
228#if defined(__GNUC__) || defined(__clang__)
229 __int128 x = static_cast<__int128>(r1) + static_cast<__int128>(m1) * factor;
230 __int128 bigM = static_cast<__int128>(m1) * m2;
231 x = ((x % bigM) + bigM) % bigM;
232 return {static_cast<int64_t>(x), static_cast<int64_t>(bigM)};
233#else
234 int64_t x = r1 + m1 * static_cast<int64_t>(factor);
235 x = ((x % M) + M) % M;
236 return {x, M};
237#endif
238}

319 }

321
322 if (found && !has_other_var_terms) {
323 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr> const_sum;
324 if (const_terms.empty()) {
325 const_sum = SymbolicExpr::number(0);
326 } else if (const_terms.size() == 1) {
327 const_sum = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(const_terms[0]);
328 } else {
329 const_sum = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(std::make_shared<AddNode>(const_terms));
330 }
331 auto rhs = SymbolicExpr::multiply(const_sum, SymbolicExpr::number(-1))->simplify();
332 return ExpBasePattern{found->first, found->second, rhs};
333 }
334 }
335
336 return std::nullopt;

在文件 poly_utils.hpp 第 172 行定义.

172 {
173 if (!node) return false;
174
175 struct DepVisitor : public SymbolicVisitor {
176 std::string v;
177 bool found = false;
178 void visit(NumberNode&) override {}
179 void visit(VariableNode& n) override { if (n.name == v) found = true; }
180 void visit(AddNode& n) override { for(auto& op : n.operands) { if(found) return; op->accept(*this); } }
181 void visit(MultiplyNode& n) override { for(auto& op : n.operands) { if(found) return; op->accept(*this); } }
182 void visit(PowerNode& n) override { n.base->accept(*this); if(!found) n.exponent->accept(*this); }
183 void visit(FunctionNode& n) override { for(auto& arg : n.arguments) { if(found) return; arg->accept(*this); } }
184 void visit(MatrixNode& n) override {
185 if (std::holds_alternative<MatrixNode::DenseStorage>(n.storage)) {
186 for (auto& item : std::get<MatrixNode::DenseStorage>(n.storage)) {
187 if (item) { item->accept(*this); if (found) return; }
188 }
189 } else {
190 for (auto& [idx, item] : std::get<MatrixNode::SparseStorage>(n.storage)) {
191 item->accept(*this); if (found) return;
192 }
193 }
194 }
195 void visit(RelationalNode& n) override {
196 if (n.left) n.left->accept(*this);
197 if (!found && n.right) n.right->accept(*this);
198 }
199 void visit(LogicalNode& n) override {
200 if (n.left) n.left->accept(*this);
201 if (!found && n.right) n.right->accept(*this);
202 }
203 } visitor;
204 visitor.v = var;
205 node->accept(visitor);
206 return visitor.found;
207}

941
942 if (!expr || !expr->root) return std::nullopt;
943

945
946 const std::string u_var = "_u_subst";
947
948 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> candidates;
949 collect_transcendental_subexprs(expr->root, var, candidates);
950 deduplicate_candidates(candidates);
951
952 for (auto& h : candidates) {
953
954 if (auto v = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(h->root)) {
955 if (v->name == var) {
956
957 auto poly = symbolic_to_poly<SymbolicPolyCoeff>(expr, var);
958 if (!poly.is_zero() && poly.degree() >= 2) {
959
960 continue;
961 }
962 }
963 }
964
965 auto u_expr = SymbolicExpr::variable(u_var);
966
967 struct SubstNodeVisitor {
968 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode> target;
969 std::string u_name;
970
971 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode> replace(const std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>& node) {
972 if (!node) return node;
973
974 if (node->equals(*target)) {
975 return std::make_shared<VariableNode>(u_name);
976 }
977
978 if (auto add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(node)) {
979 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> new_ops;
980 new_ops.reserve(add->operands.size());
981 for (auto& op : add->operands) {
982 new_ops.push_back(replace(op));
983 }
984 return SymbolicFactory::create_add(std::move(new_ops));
985 }
986 if (auto mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(node)) {
987 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> new_ops;
988 new_ops.reserve(mul->operands.size());
989 for (auto& op : mul->operands) {
990 new_ops.push_back(replace(op));
991 }
992 return SymbolicFactory::create_multiply(std::move(new_ops));
993 }
994 if (auto pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(node)) {
995 auto new_base = replace(pow->base);
996 auto new_exp = replace(pow->exponent);
997 return SymbolicFactory::create_power(new_base, new_exp);
998 }
999 if (auto func = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(node)) {
1000 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> new_args;
1001 new_args.reserve(func->arguments.size());
1002 for (auto& arg : func->arguments) {
1003 new_args.push_back(replace(arg));
1004 }
1005 return std::make_shared<FunctionNode>(func->type, std::move(new_args));
1006 }
1007
1008 return node;
1009 }
1010 };
1011

1013 visitor.target = h->root;
1014 visitor.u_name = u_var;
1015
1016 auto substituted_node = visitor.replace(expr->root);
1017 auto substituted_expr = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(substituted_node);
1018 substituted_expr = substituted_expr->simplify();
1019
1020 if (!depends_on_var(substituted_expr->root, var)) {
1021
1022 auto poly = symbolic_to_poly<SymbolicPolyCoeff>(substituted_expr, u_var);
1023 if (!poly.is_zero() && poly.degree() >= 2) {
1024 return SubstitutionResult{h, substituted_expr, u_var};
1025 }
1026 }
1027 }
1028
1029 if (has_exp_k_var_terms(expr->root, var)) {
1030 auto rewritten_node = rewrite_exp_as_u_power(expr->root, var, u_var);
1031 auto rewritten_expr = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(rewritten_node);
1032 rewritten_expr = rewritten_expr->simplify();
1033
1034 if (!depends_on_var(rewritten_expr->root, var)) {
1035
1036 auto poly = symbolic_to_poly<SymbolicPolyCoeff>(rewritten_expr, u_var);
1037 if (!poly.is_zero() && poly.degree() >= 2) {
1038
1039 auto exp_x = SymbolicExpr::exp(SymbolicExpr::variable(var));
1040 return SubstitutionResult{exp_x, rewritten_expr, u_var};
1041 }
1042 }
1043 }
1044
1045 return std::nullopt;
1046}

在文件 inequality_solver.cpp 第 13 行定义.

13 {
14 if (poly.is_zero()) return 0;
15 auto lc = poly.lead_coeff().val;
16 if (!lc) return 1;
17 auto simplified = lc->simplify();
18 if (!simplified) return 1;
19
20 try {
21 double val = simplified->to_numeric();
22 if (val > 0) return 1;
23 if (val < 0) return -1;
24 } catch (...) {}
25
26 if (auto num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(simplified->root)) {
27 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(num->value)) {
28 return std::get<BigInt>(num->value).IsNegative() ? -1 : 1;
29 }
30 if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(num->value)) {
31 return std::get<Rational>(num->value).get_numerator().IsNegative() ? -1 : 1;
32 }
33 if (std::holds_alternative<lmmc_real_t>(num->value)) {
34 return std::get<lmmc_real_t>(num->value) < 0 ? -1 : 1;
35 }
36 }
37 return 1;
38}

◆ expr_has_free_variables()

static bool lamina::expr_has_free_variables ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  node)
static

在文件 root_of_utils.cpp 第 69 行定义.

69 {
70 if (!node) return false;
71
72 struct VarCheckVisitor : public SymbolicVisitor {
73 bool found = false;
74 void visit(NumberNode&) override {}
75 void visit(VariableNode&) override { found = true; }
76 void visit(AddNode& n) override { for (auto& op : n.operands) { if (found) return; op->accept(*this); } }
77 void visit(MultiplyNode& n) override { for (auto& op : n.operands) { if (found) return; op->accept(*this); } }
78 void visit(PowerNode& n) override { n.base->accept(*this); if (!found) n.exponent->accept(*this); }
79 void visit(FunctionNode& n) override { for (auto& arg : n.arguments) { if (found) return; arg->accept(*this); } }
80 void visit(MatrixNode& n) override {
81 if (std::holds_alternative<MatrixNode::DenseStorage>(n.storage)) {
82 for (auto& item : std::get<MatrixNode::DenseStorage>(n.storage)) {
83 if (item) { item->accept(*this); if (found) return; }
84 }
85 } else {
86 for (auto& [idx, item] : std::get<MatrixNode::SparseStorage>(n.storage)) {
87 item->accept(*this); if (found) return;
88 }
89 }
90 }
91 } visitor;
92 node->accept(visitor);
93 return visitor.found;
94}

引用了 FunctionNode::arguments, PowerNode::base, PowerNode::exponent, AddNode::operands, MultiplyNode::operands , 以及 MatrixNode::storage.

◆ extended_gcd()

int64_t lamina::extended_gcd ( int64_t  a,
int64_t  b,
int64_t &  s,
int64_t &  t 
)
inline

扩展欧几里得算法，求 gcd(a, b) 及 Bezout 系数

参数
a第一个整数
b第二个整数
s输出 Bezout 系数 s，满足 a*s + b*t = gcd(a,b)
t输出 Bezout 系数 t
返回
gcd(a, b)

在文件 modular_arithmetic.hpp 第 26 行定义.

26 {
27 int64_t old_r = a, r = b;
28 int64_t old_s = 1, ss = 0;
29 int64_t old_t = 0, tt = 1;
30
31 while (r != 0) {
32 int64_t q = old_r / r;
33 int64_t tmp = r;
34 r = old_r - q * r;
35 old_r = tmp;
36
37 tmp = ss;
38 ss = old_s - q * ss;
39 old_s = tmp;
40
41 tmp = tt;
42 tt = old_t - q * tt;
43 old_t = tmp;
44 }
45
46 s = old_s;
47 t = old_t;
48 return old_r;
49}

被这些函数引用 crt(), lamina::ModInt::inverse() , 以及 rational_reconstruction().

◆ extract_coeff_value< BigInt >()

template<>
BigInt lamina::extract_coeff_value< BigInt > ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  c)
inline

在文件 poly_utils.hpp 第 123 行定义.

123 {
124 auto simp = c->simplify();
125 if (auto n = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(simp->root)) {
126 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(n->value)) return std::get<BigInt>(n->value);
127 if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(n->value)) {
128
129 Rational r = std::get<Rational>(n->value);
130 if (r.is_integer()) return r.to_BigInt();
131 // 非整数 Rational：保留为 0，避免悄悄截断。
132 return BigInt(0);
133 }
134 if (std::holds_alternative<lmmc_real_t>(n->value)) {
135 lmmc_real_t d = std::get<lmmc_real_t>(n->value);
136 // 只接受确确实实是整数级别的 double，否则返回 0 而不是悄悄截断。
137 if (std::isfinite(d) && d == std::floor(d) &&
138 d >= static_cast<lmmc_real_t>(std::numeric_limits<long long>::min()) &&
139 d <= static_cast<lmmc_real_t>(std::numeric_limits<long long>::max())) {
140 return BigInt(static_cast<long long>(d));
141 }
142 return BigInt(0);
143 }
144 }
145
146 if (simp->is_zero()) return BigInt(0);
147
148 if (simp->is_one()) return BigInt(1);
149
150 return BigInt(0);
151}

在文件 solve_transcendental.cpp 第 819 行定义.

819 {
820 auto func = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(node);
821 if (!func || func->type != FunctionNode::FuncType::Exp || func->arguments.size() != 1)
822 return 0;
823
824 auto arg = func->arguments[0];
825
826 if (auto v = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(arg)) {
827 if (v->name == var) return 1;
828 }
829
830 if (auto mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(arg)) {
831
832 std::shared_ptr<NumberNode> num_part = nullptr;
833 bool has_var = false;
834 bool has_other = false;
835
836 for (auto& op : mul->operands) {
837 if (auto n = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(op)) {
838 if (!num_part) num_part = n;
839 else has_other = true;
840 } else if (auto v = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(op)) {
841 if (v->name == var) has_var = true;
842 else has_other = true;
843 } else {
844 has_other = true;
845 }
846 }
847
848 if (has_var && num_part && !has_other) {
849 int k = 0;
850 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(num_part->value))
851 k = std::get<BigInt>(num_part->value).to_int();
852 else if (std::holds_alternative<double>(num_part->value))
853 k = (int)std::get<double>(num_part->value);
854 else if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(num_part->value))
855 k = (int)std::get<Rational>(num_part->value).to_double();
856 if (k > 0) return k;
857 }
858 }
859
860 return 0;
861}

◆ fglm_convert()

std::vector< FGLMPoly > lamina::fglm_convert ( const std::vector< FGLMPoly > &  source_basis,
const MonomialOrder &  source_order,
const MonomialOrder &  target_order,
size_t  num_vars 
)
inline

FGLM 算法：将零维理想的 Gröbner 基从源序转换到目标序

参数
source_basis源序下的 Gröbner 基
source_order源单项式序
target_order目标单项式序
num_vars变量个数
返回
目标序下的 Gröbner 基
异常
std::runtime_error理想非零维或维数过大时抛出

在文件 fglm.hpp 第 491 行定义.

495 {
496
497 if (source_basis.empty()) {
498 return {};
499 }
500
501 if (!is_zero_dimensional(source_basis, num_vars)) {
502 throw std::runtime_error(
503 "FGLM: ideal is not zero-dimensional. "
504 "FGLM only works for zero-dimensional ideals.");
505 }
506
507 int dim = quotient_dimension(source_basis, num_vars);
508 if (dim <= 0 || dim > 1000) {
509 throw std::runtime_error(
510 "FGLM: quotient dimension is too large or could not be determined. "
511 "dim = " + std::to_string(dim));
512 }
513
514 std::vector<FGLMPoly> target_basis;
515
516 std::vector<Monomial> basis_monomials;
517
518 std::vector<Monomial> standard_monomials;
519 std::map<Monomial, size_t> monomial_index;
520 {
521 std::vector<Monomial> source_lms;
522 for (const auto& g : source_basis) {
523 if (!g.is_zero()) source_lms.push_back(g.LM());
524 }
525
526 for (int d = 0; d <= dim + 2 && (int)standard_monomials.size() < dim; ++d) {
527 Monomial current(num_vars, 0);
528 std::function<void(size_t, int)> gen = [&](size_t var_idx, int remaining) {
529 if (var_idx == num_vars - 1) {
530 current[var_idx] = remaining;
531
532 bool is_std = true;
533 for (const auto& lm : source_lms) {
534 if (divides_monomial(lm, current)) { is_std = false; break; }
535 }
536 if (is_std) standard_monomials.push_back(current);
537 current[var_idx] = 0;
538 return;
539 }
540 for (int e = 0; e <= remaining; ++e) {
541 current[var_idx] = e;
542 gen(var_idx + 1, remaining - e);
543 }
544 current[var_idx] = 0;
545 };
546 gen(0, d);
547 }
548
549 for (size_t i = 0; i < standard_monomials.size(); ++i) {
550 monomial_index[standard_monomials[i]] = i;
551 }
552 }
553
554 auto nf_to_vector = [&](const FGLMPoly& nf) -> std::vector<Rational> {
555 std::vector<Rational> v(standard_monomials.size(), Rational(0));
556 for (const auto& [m, c] : nf.terms) {
557 auto it = monomial_index.find(m);
558 if (it != monomial_index.end()) {
559 v[it->second] = c;
560 }
561 }
562 return v;
563 };
564
565 detail::GaussianEliminator gauss;
566
567 int max_mono_degree = dim + 5;
568 detail::MonomialEnumerator enumerator(num_vars, target_order, max_mono_degree);
569
570 std::vector<Monomial> target_lms;
571
572 const int max_iterations = dim * 10 + 50;
573 int iterations = 0;
574
575 Monomial t;
576 while (enumerator.next(t) && iterations < max_iterations) {
577 ++iterations;
578
579 bool skip = false;
580 for (const auto& lm : target_lms) {
581 if (divides_monomial(lm, t)) {
582 skip = true;
583 break;
584 }
585 }
586 if (skip) continue;
587
588 FGLMPoly t_poly = FGLMPoly::from_monomial(t, num_vars);
589 FGLMPoly nf = normal_form(t_poly, source_basis, source_order);
590
591 std::vector<Rational> v = nf_to_vector(nf);
592
593 std::vector<Rational> combination;
594 bool independent = gauss.add_vector(v, combination);
595
596 if (independent) {
597
598 basis_monomials.push_back(t);
599
600 if (static_cast<int>(basis_monomials.size()) >= dim) {
601
602 }
603 } else {
604
605 FGLMPoly new_elem(num_vars);
606 new_elem.add_term(t, Rational(1));
607
608 for (size_t i = 0; i < combination.size() && i < basis_monomials.size(); ++i) {
609 if (!combination[i].is_zero()) {
610
611 new_elem.add_term(basis_monomials[i], -combination[i]);
612 }
613 }
614
615 new_elem.sort_terms(target_order);
616 new_elem.normalize();
617
618 if (!new_elem.is_zero()) {
619 Rational lc = new_elem.LC();
620 if (!(lc == Rational(1))) {
621 for (auto& [m, c] : new_elem.terms) {
622 c = c / lc;
623 }
624 }
625 }
626
627 if (!new_elem.is_zero()) {
628 target_lms.push_back(new_elem.LM());
629 target_basis.push_back(std::move(new_elem));
630 }
631 }
632
633 if (static_cast<int>(basis_monomials.size()) >= dim) {
634
635 bool complete = true;
636 for (size_t var = 0; var < num_vars; ++var) {
637 bool has_gen = false;
638 for (const auto& lm : target_lms) {
639
640 bool is_pure = true;
641 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_vars; ++i) {
642 int exp_i = (i < lm.size()) ? lm[i] : 0;
643 if (i == var) {
644 if (exp_i == 0) { is_pure = false; break; }
645 } else {
646 if (exp_i != 0) { is_pure = false; break; }
647 }
648 }
649 if (is_pure) { has_gen = true; break; }
650 }
651 if (!has_gen) { complete = false; break; }
652 }
653 if (complete) break;
654 }
655 }
656
657 return target_basis;
658}

FGLMPoly normal_form(const FGLMPoly &f, const std::vector< FGLMPoly > &basis, const MonomialOrder &order)

◆ find_rational_roots()

std::vector< Rational > lamina::find_rational_roots ( const Polynomial< Rational > &  poly)

查找有理系数多项式的所有有理根。

参数
poly有理系数多项式
返回
有理根列表

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 822 行定义.

822 {
823 std::vector<Rational> roots;
824
825 if (poly.is_zero() || poly.degree() < 1) {
826 return roots;
827 }
828
829 Polynomial<Rational> current = poly;
830
831 while (current.degree() >= 1 && current.coeffs[0] == Rational(0)) {
832 roots.push_back(Rational(0));
833
834 std::vector<Rational> new_coeffs(current.coeffs.begin() + 1, current.coeffs.end());
835 current = Polynomial<Rational>(new_coeffs, current.variable_name);
836 }
837
838 while (current.degree() >= 1) {
839
840 Rational a0 = current.coeffs[0];
841 Rational an = current.lead_coeff();
842
843 if (a0 == Rational(0)) {
844
845 roots.push_back(Rational(0));
846 std::vector<Rational> new_coeffs(current.coeffs.begin() + 1, current.coeffs.end());
847 current = Polynomial<Rational>(new_coeffs, current.variable_name);
848 continue;
849 }
850
851 BigInt lcm_den(1);
852 for (const auto& c : current.coeffs) {
853 BigInt d = c.get_denominator();
854 lcm_den = BigInt::lcm(lcm_den, d);
855 }
856
857 BigInt int_a0 = (a0 * Rational(lcm_den)).get_numerator();
858 BigInt int_an = (an * Rational(lcm_den)).get_numerator();
859
860 std::vector<BigInt> p_divs = positive_divisors(int_a0);
861 std::vector<BigInt> q_divs = positive_divisors(int_an);
862
863 if (p_divs.empty() || q_divs.empty()) {
864 break;
865 }
866
867 bool found_root = false;
868 Rational found_r;
869
870 for (const auto& p : p_divs) {
871 for (const auto& q : q_divs) {
872
873 Rational candidate_pos(p, q);
874 Rational candidate_neg(-p, q);
875
876 if (current.eval(candidate_pos) == Rational(0)) {
877 found_root = true;
878 found_r = candidate_pos;
879 break;
880 }
881 if (current.eval(candidate_neg) == Rational(0)) {
882 found_root = true;
883 found_r = candidate_neg;
884 break;
885 }
886 }
887 if (found_root) break;
888 }
889
890 if (!found_root) {
891 break;
892 }
893
894 Polynomial<Rational> linear_factor({-found_r, Rational(1)}, current.variable_name);
895
896 while (current.degree() >= 1) {
897 auto [quotient, remainder] = current.div_mod(linear_factor);
898
899 if (!remainder.is_zero()) {
900 break;
901 }
902 roots.push_back(found_r);
903 current = quotient;
904
905 if (current.degree() < 1 || current.eval(found_r) != Rational(0)) {
906 break;
907 }
908 }
909
910 if (current.degree() <= 4) {
911 break;
912 }
913 }
914
915 return roots;
916}

◆ find_roots_with_multiplicity()

static std::vector< std::pair< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr >, int > > lamina::find_roots_with_multiplicity ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  expr,
const std::string &  variable 
)
static

在文件 inequality_solver.cpp 第 40 行定义.

42 {
43
44 std::vector<std::pair<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>, int>> result;
45
46 auto poly_rat = symbolic_to_poly<Rational>(expr, variable);
47 if (poly_rat.is_zero() || poly_rat.degree() <= 0) {
48 return result;
49 }
50
51 auto factors = square_free_factorization(poly_rat);
52 if (factors.empty()) {
53
54 auto poly_spc = symbolic_to_poly<SymbolicPolyCoeff>(expr, variable);
55 if (!poly_spc.is_zero() && poly_spc.degree() >= 1) {
56 auto roots = solve_by_factoring(poly_spc, variable);
57 for (const auto& root : roots) {
58 if (!root) continue;
59 try {
60 double val = root->to_numeric();
61 if (std::isfinite(val)) {
62 result.push_back({root, 1});
63 }
64 } catch (...) {}
65 }
66 }
67 return result;
68 }
69
70 for (const auto& [factor, mult] : factors) {
71 if (factor.degree() <= 0) continue;
72
73 if (factor.degree() == 1) {
74
75 Rational a = factor.coeffs[1];
76 Rational b = factor.coeffs[0];
77 if (a != Rational(0)) {
78 Rational root_val = Rational(0) - b / a;
79 auto root_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(root_val);
80 try {
81 double val = root_expr->to_numeric();
82 if (std::isfinite(val)) {
83 result.push_back({root_expr, mult});
84 }
85 } catch (...) {}
86 }
87 continue;
88 }
89
90 if (factor.degree() == 2) {
91 Rational a = factor.coeffs[2];
92 Rational b = factor.coeffs[1];
93 Rational c = factor.coeffs[0];
94
95 Rational disc = b * b - Rational(4) * a * c;
96 double disc_val = disc.to_double();
97 if (disc_val < -1e-10) continue;
98 if (disc_val < 0) disc_val = 0;
99
100 double a_val = a.to_double();
101 double b_val = b.to_double();
102 double sqrt_disc = std::sqrt(disc_val);
103
104 double r1 = (-b_val + sqrt_disc) / (2.0 * a_val);
105 double r2 = (-b_val - sqrt_disc) / (2.0 * a_val);
106
107 if (std::isfinite(r1)) {
108 result.push_back({SymbolicExpr::number(r1), mult});
109 }
110 if (std::isfinite(r2) && std::abs(r1 - r2) > 1e-10) {
111 result.push_back({SymbolicExpr::number(r2), mult});
112 }
113 continue;
114 }
115
116 std::vector<SymbolicPolyCoeff> spc_coeffs;
117 for (int i = 0; i <= factor.degree(); ++i) {
118 spc_coeffs.push_back(SymbolicPolyCoeff(SymbolicExpr::number(factor.coeffs[i])));
119 }
120 Polynomial<SymbolicPolyCoeff> factor_spc(spc_coeffs, variable);
121
122 auto factor_roots = solve_by_factoring(factor_spc, variable);
123 for (const auto& root : factor_roots) {
124 if (!root) continue;
125 try {
126 double val = root->to_numeric();
127 if (std::isfinite(val)) {
128 result.push_back({root, mult});
129 }
130 } catch (...) {}
131 }
132 }
133
134 return result;
135}

◆ gaussian_eliminate()

void lamina::gaussian_eliminate ( std::vector< std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > > &  A,
size_t  m,
size_t  n,
std::vector< size_t > &  pivot_col_for_row,
int &  sign 
)

对增广矩阵进行高斯消元

参数
A增广矩阵（符号表达式元素）
m行数
n列数
pivot_col_for_row输出各行的主元列号
sign输出行交换的符号（+1 或 -1）

在文件 solver.cpp 第 19 行定义.

19 {
20 size_t pivot_row = 0;
21 sign = 1;
22 pivot_col_for_row.assign(m, (size_t)-1);
23
24 for (size_t col = 0; col < n && pivot_row < m; ++col) {
25 size_t max_row = pivot_row;
26 bool found_pivot = false;
27 while (max_row < m) {
28 A[max_row][col] = A[max_row][col]->simplify();
29 if (!A[max_row][col]->is_zero()) {
30 found_pivot = true;
31 break;
32 }
33 max_row++;
34 }
35
36 if (!found_pivot) continue;
37
38 if (pivot_row != max_row) {
39 std::swap(A[pivot_row], A[max_row]);
40 sign = -sign;
41 }
42
43 pivot_col_for_row[pivot_row] = col;
44 auto pivot = A[pivot_row][col];
45 auto pivot_inv = SymbolicExpr::power(pivot, SymbolicExpr::number(-1));
46
47 for (size_t k = col; k < A[pivot_row].size(); ++k) {
48 A[pivot_row][k] = SymbolicExpr::multiply(A[pivot_row][k], pivot_inv)->simplify();
49 }
50
51 for (size_t i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
52 if (i != pivot_row) {
53 auto factor = A[i][col];
54 if (!factor->is_zero()) {
55 auto neg_factor = SymbolicExpr::multiply(factor, SymbolicExpr::number(-1));
56 for (size_t k = col; k < A[i].size(); ++k) {
57 auto term = SymbolicExpr::multiply(neg_factor, A[pivot_row][k]);
58 A[i][k] = SymbolicExpr::add(A[i][k], term)->simplify();
59 }
60 }
61 }
62 }
63 pivot_row++;
64 }
65}

引用了 SymbolicExpr::add(), SymbolicExpr::multiply(), SymbolicExpr::number() , 以及 SymbolicExpr::power().

被这些函数引用 lamina::Solver::solve_linear_system() , 以及 SymbolicExpr::solve_system().

static bool lamina::get_integer_value ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  node,
long long &  value 
)
static

在文件 solver.cpp 第 71 行定义.

71 {
72 auto num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(node);
73 if (!num) return false;
74 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(num->value)) {
75 value = std::get<BigInt>(num->value).to_int();
76 return true;
77 }
78 if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(num->value)) {
79 const auto& r = std::get<Rational>(num->value);
80 if (!r.is_integer()) return false;
81 value = r.to_BigInt().to_int();
82 return true;
83 }
84 if (std::holds_alternative<lmmc_real_t>(num->value)) {
85 lmmc_real_t d = std::get<lmmc_real_t>(num->value);
86 int eq;
87 lmmc_double_nearly_equal_tol(d, std::round(d), 1e-12, 1e-12, &eq);
88 if (!eq) return false;
89 value = static_cast<long long>(std::llround(d));
90 return true;
91 }
92 return false;
93}

对隐函数 F(x, y) = 0 求 dy/dx

利用隐函数定理：dy/dx = -F_x / F_y

参数
F隐函数表达式 F(x, y)
x自变量名
y因变量名

dy/dx 的符号表达式

27 {
28 DifferentiationVisitor d_dx(x);
29 F->root->accept(d_dx);
30 auto dFdx = d_dx.result;
31
32 DifferentiationVisitor d_dy(y);
33 F->root->accept(d_dy);
34 auto dFdy = d_dy.result;
35
36 auto minus = SymbolicExpr::number(-1);
37 auto num = SymbolicExpr::multiply(minus, std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(dFdx));
38 auto denom = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(dFdy);
39 return SymbolicExpr::divide(num, denom);
40}

374 {
375
376 lmmc_real_t c_val;
377 if (try_evaluate_numeric(c, c_val)) {
378 if (std::abs(c_val) > 1.0 + LMMC_REAL_EPSILON) {
379 return {};
380 }
381 }
382
383 auto pi = make_pi();
384 auto acos_c = make_arccos(c);
385
386 int num_periods = 1;
387 if (max_roots > 0) {
388 num_periods = (max_roots + 1) / 2;

390
391 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
392 for (int k = 0; k < num_periods; ++k) {
393 auto two_k_pi = SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(2 * k), pi);
394
395 auto sol1 = SymbolicExpr::add(acos_c, two_k_pi)->simplify();
396 results.push_back(sol1);
397
398 auto neg_acos = SymbolicExpr::multiply(acos_c, SymbolicExpr::number(-1));
399 auto sol2 = SymbolicExpr::add(neg_acos, two_k_pi)->simplify();
400 results.push_back(sol2);
401 }
402
403 return results;
404}

在文件 solve_transcendental.cpp 第 515 行定义.

518 {
519 if (n <= 0) return {};
520
521 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
522 auto exponent = SymbolicExpr::divide(SymbolicExpr::number(1), SymbolicExpr::number(n));
523
524 if (n % 2 == 0) {
525
526 lmmc_real_t u_val;
527 if (try_evaluate_numeric(u_root, u_val)) {
528 if (u_val < 0.0) return {};
529 }
530
531 auto pos_root = SymbolicExpr::power(u_root, exponent)->simplify();
532 auto neg_root = SymbolicExpr::multiply(pos_root, SymbolicExpr::number(-1))->simplify();
533 results.push_back(pos_root);
534 results.push_back(neg_root);
535 } else {
536
537 auto root_val = SymbolicExpr::power(u_root, exponent)->simplify();
538 results.push_back(root_val);
539 }
540
541 return results;
542}

◆ invert_sin()

static std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::invert_sin ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  c,
int  max_roots 
)
static

在文件 solve_transcendental.cpp 第 339 行定义.

340 {
341
342 lmmc_real_t c_val;
343 if (try_evaluate_numeric(c, c_val)) {
344 if (std::abs(c_val) > 1.0 + LMMC_REAL_EPSILON) {
345 return {};
346 }
347 }
348
349 auto pi = make_pi();
350 auto asin_c = make_arcsin(c);
351
352 int num_periods = 1;
353 if (max_roots > 0) {
354
355 num_periods = (max_roots + 1) / 2;
356 }
357
358 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
359 for (int k = 0; k < num_periods; ++k) {
360
361 auto two_k_pi = SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(2 * k), pi);
362 auto sol1 = SymbolicExpr::add(asin_c, two_k_pi)->simplify();
363 results.push_back(sol1);
364
365 auto pi_minus_asin = SymbolicExpr::add(pi, SymbolicExpr::multiply(asin_c, SymbolicExpr::number(-1)));
366 auto sol2 = SymbolicExpr::add(pi_minus_asin, two_k_pi)->simplify();
367 results.push_back(sol2);
368 }
369
370 return results;
371}

引用了 SymbolicExpr::add(), make_arcsin(), make_pi(), SymbolicExpr::multiply(), SymbolicExpr::number() , 以及 try_evaluate_numeric().

被这些函数引用 solve_transcendental_impl().

const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  u_root,
const std::string &  var 
)
static

在文件 solve_transcendental.cpp 第 544 行定义.

547 {
548
549 if (!h_expr || !h_expr->root) return {};
550
551 if (auto func = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(h_expr->root)) {
552 if (func->arguments.size() == 1) {
553
554 if (auto v = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(func->arguments[0])) {
555 if (v->name == var) {
556 switch (func->type) {
557 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Exp:
558 return invert_h_exp(u_root, var);
559 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Sin:
560 return invert_h_sin(u_root, var);
561 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Cos:
562 return invert_h_cos(u_root, var);
563 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Tan:
564 return invert_h_tan(u_root, var);
565 default:
566 break;
567 }
568 }
569 }
570
571 }
572 }
573
574 if (auto v = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(h_expr->root)) {
575 if (v->name == var) {
576
577 return {u_root};
578 }
579 }
580
581 if (auto pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(h_expr->root)) {
582 if (auto v = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(pow->base)) {
583 if (v->name == var && !depends_on_var(pow->exponent, var)) {
584 if (auto exp_num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(pow->exponent)) {
585 int n = 0;
586 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(exp_num->value))
587 n = std::get<BigInt>(exp_num->value).to_int();
588 else if (std::holds_alternative<double>(exp_num->value))
589 n = (int)std::get<double>(exp_num->value);
590 else if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(exp_num->value))
591 n = (int)std::get<Rational>(exp_num->value).to_double();
592 if (n >= 2) {
593 return invert_h_power(u_root, var, n);
594 }
595 }
596 }
597 }
598 }
599
600 auto eq = SymbolicExpr::add(h_expr,
601 SymbolicExpr::multiply(u_root, SymbolicExpr::number(-1)))->simplify();
602
603 auto poly = symbolic_to_poly<SymbolicPolyCoeff>(eq, var);
604 if (!poly.is_zero() && poly.degree() >= 1) {
605 return SymbolicExpr::solve(eq, var);
606 }
607
608 return {};
609}

◆ is_even_integer_number()

static bool lamina::is_even_integer_number ( const NumberNode &  num)
static

Helper: check if a NumberNode holds an even integer value.

在文件 inference_engine.cpp 第 681 行定义.

681 {
682 if (!is_integer_number(num)) return false;
683
684 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(num.value)) {
685 return std::get<BigInt>(num.value).is_even();
686 }
687 if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(num.value)) {
688 // Rational with denominator 1 — check numerator
689 BigInt n = std::get<Rational>(num.value).get_numerator();
690 return n.is_even();
691 }
692 // double case — guard against overflow for very large values
693 double v = std::get<lmmc_real_t>(num.value);
694 if (std::fabs(v) >= static_cast<double>(LLONG_MAX)) {
695 return std::fmod(v, 2.0) == 0.0;
696 }
697 long long iv = static_cast<long long>(v);
698 return (iv % 2) == 0;
699}

◆ is_integer_number()

static bool lamina::is_integer_number ( const NumberNode &  num)
static

Helper: check if a NumberNode holds an integer value.

Works for BigInt (always integer), Rational (if denominator == 1), and double (if finite and equal to its floor).

在文件 inference_engine.cpp 第 666 行定义.

666 {

static bool lamina::is_polynomial_node ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  node)
static

在文件 solver.cpp 第 197 行定义.

197 {
198 if (!node) return false;
199 if (std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(node)) return true;
200 if (std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(node)) return true;
201
202 if (auto add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(node)) {
203 for (const auto& op : add->operands) {
204 if (!is_polynomial_node(op)) return false;
205 }
206 return true;
207 }
208
209 if (auto mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(node)) {
210 for (const auto& op : mul->operands) {
211 if (!is_polynomial_node(op)) return false;
212 }
213 return true;
214 }
215
216 if (auto pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(node)) {
217 long long exp = 0;
218 if (!get_integer_value(pow->exponent, exp)) return false;
219 if (exp < 0) return false;
220 return is_polynomial_node(pow->base);
221 }
222
223 return false;
224}

◆ is_purely_numeric()

static bool lamina::is_purely_numeric ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  expr)
static

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 10 行定义.

10 {
11 if (!expr || !expr->root) return true;
12
13 struct VarDetector : public SymbolicVisitor {
14 bool has_var = false;
15 void visit(NumberNode&) override {}
16 void visit(VariableNode&) override { has_var = true; }
17 void visit(AddNode& n) override { for (auto& op : n.operands) { if (has_var) return; op->accept(*this); } }
18 void visit(MultiplyNode& n) override { for (auto& op : n.operands) { if (has_var) return; op->accept(*this); } }
19 void visit(PowerNode& n) override { n.base->accept(*this); if (!has_var) n.exponent->accept(*this); }
20 void visit(FunctionNode& n) override { for (auto& arg : n.arguments) { if (has_var) return; arg->accept(*this); } }
21 void visit(MatrixNode&) override {}
22 } detector;
23
24 expr->root->accept(detector);
25 return !detector.has_var;
26}

引用了 FunctionNode::arguments, PowerNode::base, PowerNode::exponent, AddNode::operands , 以及 MultiplyNode::operands.

被这些函数引用 solve_biquadratic(), solve_cubic() , 以及 solve_quartic().

◆ is_zero_dimensional()

bool lamina::is_zero_dimensional ( const std::vector< FGLMPoly > &  basis,
size_t  num_vars 
)
inline

判断理想是否为零维（每个变量都有纯幂次首项）

参数
basisGröbner 基
num_vars变量个数
返回
零维返回 true

在文件 fglm.hpp 第 193 行定义.

193 {
194 if (basis.empty()) return false;
195
196 for (size_t var = 0; var < num_vars; ++var) {
197 bool found = false;
198 for (const auto& g : basis) {
199 if (g.is_zero()) continue;
200 Monomial lm = g.LM();
201
202 bool is_pure = true;
203 for (size_t i = 0; i < num_vars; ++i) {
204 int exp_i = (i < lm.size()) ? lm[i] : 0;
205 if (i == var) {
206 if (exp_i == 0) { is_pure = false; break; }
207 } else {
208 if (exp_i != 0) { is_pure = false; break; }
209 }
210 }
211 if (is_pure) { found = true; break; }
212 }
213 if (!found) return false;
214 }
215 return true;
216}

引用了 lamina::FGLMPoly::LM().

被这些函数引用 fglm_convert().

◆ isolate_real_roots()

std::vector< std::pair< Rational, Rational > > lamina::isolate_real_roots ( const Polynomial< Rational > &  poly)

使用 Sturm 序列隔离有理系数多项式的所有实根。

参数
poly有理系数多项式
返回
隔离区间列表，每个区间包含恰好一个实根

在文件 newton_raphson.cpp 第 94 行定义.

96{
97 std::vector<std::pair<Rational, Rational>> result;
98
99 if (poly.is_zero() || poly.degree() <= 0) {
100 return result;
101 }
102
103 Polynomial<Rational> sqfree = poly.square_free_part();
104 if (sqfree.is_zero() || sqfree.degree() <= 0) {
105 return result;
106 }
107
108 std::vector<Polynomial<Rational>> sturm;
109 sturm.push_back(sqfree);
110 sturm.push_back(sqfree.differentiate());
111
112 while (true) {
113 size_t n = sturm.size();
114 const auto& prev2 = sturm[n - 2];
115 const auto& prev1 = sturm[n - 1];
116
117 if (prev1.is_zero()) break;
118
119 auto [quotient, remainder] = prev2.div_mod(prev1);
120
121 if (remainder.is_zero()) break;
122
123 Polynomial<Rational> neg_rem(remainder.variable_name);
124 neg_rem.coeffs.resize(remainder.coeffs.size());
125 for (size_t i = 0; i < remainder.coeffs.size(); ++i) {
126 neg_rem.coeffs[i] = -remainder.coeffs[i];
127 }
128 neg_rem.trim();
129
130 sturm.push_back(neg_rem);
131 }
132
133 Rational bound = cauchy_bound(sqfree);
134 Rational lo = -bound;
135 Rational hi = bound;
136
137 int total_roots = roots_in_interval(sturm, lo, hi);
138 if (total_roots <= 0) {
139 return result;
140 }
141
142 struct Interval {
143 Rational lo, hi;
144 int root_count;
145 };
146
147 std::vector<Interval> work_queue;
148 work_queue.push_back({lo, hi, total_roots});
149
150 while (!work_queue.empty()) {
151 Interval current = work_queue.back();
152 work_queue.pop_back();
153
154 if (current.root_count == 0) {
155 continue;
156 }
157
158 if (current.root_count == 1) {
159 result.push_back({current.lo, current.hi});
160 continue;
161 }
162
163 Rational mid = (current.lo + current.hi) / Rational(2);
164
165 int left_count = roots_in_interval(sturm, current.lo, mid);
166 int right_count = roots_in_interval(sturm, mid, current.hi);
167
168 if (left_count + right_count < current.root_count) {
169
170 result.push_back({mid, mid});
171 }
172
173 if (right_count > 0) {
174 work_queue.push_back({mid, current.hi, right_count});
175 }
176 if (left_count > 0) {
177 work_queue.push_back({current.lo, mid, left_count});
178 }
179 }
180
181 std::sort(result.begin(), result.end(),
182 [](const std::pair<Rational, Rational>& a,
183 const std::pair<Rational, Rational>& b) {
184 return a.first < b.first;
185 });
186
187 return result;
188}

40 {

46 return result;

◆ line_plane_intersection()

std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::line_plane_intersection ( const LineSymbolic &  line,
const PlaneSymbolic &  plane 
)

计算直线与平面的交点

参数
line直线
plane平面
返回
交点坐标向量

在文件 symbolic_vector_geometry.cpp 第 80 行定义.

83 {
84
85 auto n_dot_a = vector_dot(plane.normal, line.point);
86 auto n_dot_b = vector_dot(plane.normal, line.direction);
87 // If n . direction == 0 the line is parallel to the plane: either lies in
88 // the plane (infinite intersections) or has no intersection. In both cases
89 // we cannot return a single point, so signal "no unique intersection" via
90 // an empty vector instead of dividing by zero.
91 auto n_dot_b_simpl = n_dot_b ? n_dot_b->simplify() : nullptr;
92 if (!n_dot_b_simpl || n_dot_b_simpl->is_zero()) {
93 return {};
94 }
95 auto t = SymbolicExpr::divide(SymbolicExpr::add(plane.d, SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(-1), n_dot_a)), n_dot_b);
96 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> intersection;
97 for (size_t i = 0; i < line.point.size(); ++i) {
98 intersection.push_back(SymbolicExpr::add(line.point[i], SymbolicExpr::multiply(t, line.direction[i])));
99 }
100 return intersection;
101}

22
23 if (p_index == p_ops.size()) {

29

◆ match_recursive()

static bool lamina::match_recursive ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  p_node,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  t_node,
const std::unordered_set< std::string > &  wildcards,
MatchMap &  results 
)
static

在文件 matcher.cpp 第 65 行定义.

68 {
69 if (!p_node) return !t_node;
70 if (!t_node) return false;
71
72 std::string wname;
73 if (is_wildcard(p_node, wildcards, wname)) {
74
75 if (results.count(wname)) {
76
77 return results[wname].root->equals(*t_node);
78 } else {
79
80 results[wname] = SymbolicExpr(t_node);
81 return true;
82 }
83 }
84
85 if (p_node->type_priority() != t_node->type_priority()) return false;
86
87 if (p_node->is_number() || std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(p_node)) {
88 return p_node->equals(*t_node);
89 }
90
91 if (auto p_add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(p_node)) {
92 auto t_add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(t_node);
93
94 if (p_add->operands.size() > t_add->operands.size()) return false;
95
96 std::vector<bool> used(t_add->operands.size(), false);
97 if (match_commutative_recursive(p_add->operands, t_add->operands, used, 0, wildcards, results)) {
98
99 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> rest;
100 for (size_t i = 0; i < used.size(); ++i) {
101 if (!used[i]) {
102 rest.push_back(t_add->operands[i]);
103 }
104 }
105
106 if (!rest.empty()) {
107
108 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode> rest_node;
109 if (rest.size() == 1) rest_node = rest[0];
110 else rest_node = SymbolicFactory::create_add(rest);
111
112 if (results.find("__Add_REST__") != results.end()) {
113 auto existing = results["__Add_REST__"];
114
115 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> combined_ops;
116 if (auto existing_add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(existing.root)) {
117 combined_ops.insert(combined_ops.end(), existing_add->operands.begin(), existing_add->operands.end());
118 } else {
119 combined_ops.push_back(existing.root);
120 }
121 combined_ops.push_back(rest_node);
122 results["__Add_REST__"] = SymbolicExpr(SymbolicFactory::create_add(combined_ops));
123 } else {
124 results["__Add_REST__"] = SymbolicExpr(rest_node);
125 }
126 }
127 return true;
128 }
129 return false;
130 }
131
132 if (auto p_mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(p_node)) {
133 auto t_mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(t_node);
134
135 if (p_mul->operands.size() > t_mul->operands.size()) return false;
136
137 std::vector<bool> used(t_mul->operands.size(), false);
138 if (match_commutative_recursive(p_mul->operands, t_mul->operands, used, 0, wildcards, results)) {
139
140 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> rest;
141 for (size_t i = 0; i < used.size(); ++i) {
142 if (!used[i]) {
143 rest.push_back(t_mul->operands[i]);
144 }
145 }
146 if (!rest.empty()) {
147 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode> rest_node;
148 if (rest.size() == 1) rest_node = rest[0];
149 else rest_node = SymbolicFactory::create_multiply(rest);
150
151 if (results.find("__Mul_REST__") != results.end()) {
152 auto existing = results["__Mul_REST__"];
153 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> combined_ops;
154 if (auto existing_mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(existing.root)) {
155 combined_ops.insert(combined_ops.end(), existing_mul->operands.begin(), existing_mul->operands.end());
156 } else {
157 combined_ops.push_back(existing.root);
158 }
159 combined_ops.push_back(rest_node);
160 results["__Mul_REST__"] = SymbolicExpr(SymbolicFactory::create_multiply(combined_ops));
161 } else {
162 results["__Mul_REST__"] = SymbolicExpr(rest_node);
163 }
164 }
165 return true;
166 }
167 return false;
168 }
169
170 if (auto p_pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(p_node)) {
171 auto t_pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(t_node);
172 return match_recursive(p_pow->base, t_pow->base, wildcards, results) &&
173 match_recursive(p_pow->exponent, t_pow->exponent, wildcards, results);
174 }
175
176 if (auto p_func = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(p_node)) {
177 auto t_func = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(t_node);
178 if (p_func->type != t_func->type) return false;
179 if (p_func->arguments.size() != t_func->arguments.size()) return false;
180 for (size_t i = 0; i < p_func->arguments.size(); ++i) {
181 if (!match_recursive(p_func->arguments[i], t_func->arguments[i], wildcards, results)) {
182 return false;
183 }
184 }
185 return true;
186 }
187
188 return p_node->equals(*t_node);
189}

const std::vector< int64_t > &  primes 
)
inline

多模数中国剩余定理

参数
residues余数列表
primes对应的模数列表（两两互素）
返回
pair(合并余数, 合并模数)
异常
std::invalid_argument若输入为空或大小不匹配

在文件 modular_arithmetic.hpp 第 247 行定义.

248 {
249 if (residues.empty() || residues.size() != primes.size()) {
250 throw std::invalid_argument("multi_crt(): residues and primes must be non-empty and same size");
251 }
252
253 int64_t combined = residues[0];
254 int64_t modulus = primes[0];
255
256 for (size_t i = 1; i < residues.size(); ++i) {
257 auto [x, m] = crt(combined, modulus, residues[i], primes[i]);
258 combined = x;
259 modulus = m;
260 }
261
262 return {combined, modulus};
263}

static std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > lamina::multiply_no_expand ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  term,
const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > > &  den_factors 
)
static

在文件 solver.cpp 第 144 行定义.

147 {
148 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> factors;
149 if (auto mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(term)) {
150 factors.insert(factors.end(), mul->operands.begin(), mul->operands.end());
151 } else if (term) {
152 factors.push_back(term);
153 }
154 factors.insert(factors.end(), den_factors.begin(), den_factors.end());
155
156 auto const_acc = std::make_shared<NumberNode>(BigInt(1));
157 std::map<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>, std::shared_ptr<NumberNode>, NodeLess> bases;
158
159 for (const auto& op : factors) {
160 if (!op) continue;
161 if (auto num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(op)) {
162 const_acc = multiply_number_nodes(const_acc, num);
163 continue;
164 }
165
166 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode> base = op;
167 std::shared_ptr<NumberNode> exp = std::make_shared<NumberNode>(BigInt(1));
168 if (auto pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(op)) {
169 base = pow->base;
170 if (auto e_num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(pow->exponent)) {
171 exp = e_num;
172 }
173 }
174
175 auto it = bases.find(base);
176 if (it == bases.end()) {
177 bases[base] = exp;
178 } else {
179 bases[base] = add_number_nodes(it->second, exp);
180 }
181 }
182
183 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> final_ops;
184 if (!const_acc->is_one()) final_ops.push_back(const_acc);
185
186 for (const auto& [base, exp] : bases) {
187 if (exp->is_zero()) continue;
188 if (exp->is_one()) final_ops.push_back(base);
189 else final_ops.push_back(std::make_shared<PowerNode>(base, exp));
190 }
191
192 if (final_ops.empty()) return SymbolicExpr::number(1);
193 if (final_ops.size() == 1) return std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(final_ops[0]);
194 return std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(std::make_shared<MultiplyNode>(final_ops));
195}

130 Rational r2 = std::holds_alternative<Rational>(b->value) ? std::get<Rational>(b->value) : Rational(std::get<BigInt>(b->value));
131 return std::make_shared<NumberNode>(r1 * r2);
132 }
133
134 return std::make_shared<NumberNode>(std::get<BigInt>(a->value) * std::get<BigInt>(b->value));

◆ newton_raphson() [1/2]

std::optional< NumericRoot > lamina::newton_raphson ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  f,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  df,
const std::string &  var,
lmmc_real_t  x0,
const SolveOptions &  opts 
)

Newton-Raphson 迭代求根（无区间约束）。

参数
f目标函数表达式
df目标函数的导数表达式
var求解变量名
x0迭代初始值
opts求解选项
返回
收敛时返回数值根，否则返回 nullopt

在文件 newton_raphson.cpp 第 281 行定义.

287{
288 lmmc_real_t x = x0;
289 for (int i = 1; i <= opts.max_newton_iterations; ++i) {
290
291 auto fx_expr = f->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(x));
292 auto dfx_expr = df->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(x));
293
294 lmmc_real_t fx = fx_expr->to_numeric();
295 lmmc_real_t dfx = dfx_expr->to_numeric();
296
297 if (std::abs(fx) < opts.tolerance) {
298 return NumericRoot{x, std::abs(fx), i};
299 }
300
301 if (std::abs(dfx) < 1e-15) {
302
303 return std::nullopt;
304 }
305
306 lmmc_real_t x_new = x - fx / dfx;
307
308 if (i > 1 && std::abs(x_new - x) > 2.0 * std::abs(x - x0)) {
309 x_new = x - 0.5 * fx / dfx;
310 }
311
312 x = x_new;
313 }
314
315 return std::nullopt;
316}

引用了 lamina::SolveOptions::max_newton_iterations, SymbolicExpr::number() , 以及 lamina::SolveOptions::tolerance.

被这些函数引用 rootof_evaluate() , 以及 solve_numeric().

x0迭代初始值

260 if (std::abs(fx) < opts.tolerance) {
261 return NumericRoot{x, std::abs(fx), i};

274

276 }
277
278 return std::nullopt;
279}

在文件 polynomial.hpp 第 549 行定义.

549 {
550 if (p.is_zero()) return os << "0";
551 for (int i = p.degree(); i >= 0; --i) {
552 T c = p.coeffs[i];
553 if (c == T(0)) continue;
554
555 if (i < p.degree()) {
556 if (c > T(0)) os << " + ";
557 else os << " - ";
558 } else {
559 if (c < T(0)) os << "-";
560 }
561
562 T abs_c = (c < T(0)) ? (c * T(-1)) : c;
563 if (abs_c != T(1) || i == 0) os << abs_c;
564
565 if (i > 0) os << p.variable_name;
566 if (i > 1) os << "^" << i;
567 }
568 return os;
569}

513 }
514
515 if (starts_with_at(str, pos, "+\xe2\x88\x9e")) {
516 ep.is_pos_infinity = true;
517 ep.is_neg_infinity = false;
518 ep.is_open = true;
519 ep.value = nullptr;
520 pos += 4;
521 return true;
522 }
523
524 auto val = parse_numeric_value(str, pos);
525 if (!val) return false;
526
527 ep.value = val;
528 ep.is_neg_infinity = false;
529 ep.is_pos_infinity = false;
530
531 return true;
532}

在文件 interval.cpp 第 462 行定义.

462 {
463 size_t start = pos;
464 bool has_sign = false;
465 bool has_digit = false;
466 bool has_dot = false;
467
468 if (pos < str.size() && (str[pos] == '-' || str[pos] == '+')) {
469 has_sign = true;
470 ++pos;
471 }
472
473 while (pos < str.size() && std::isdigit(static_cast<unsigned char>(str[pos]))) {
474 has_digit = true;
475 ++pos;
476 }
477
478 if (pos < str.size() && str[pos] == '.') {
479 has_dot = true;
480 ++pos;
481 while (pos < str.size() && std::isdigit(static_cast<unsigned char>(str[pos]))) {
482 has_digit = true;
483 ++pos;
484 }
485 }
486
487 if (!has_digit) {
488 pos = start;
489 return nullptr;
490 }
491
492 std::string num_str = str.substr(start, pos - start);
493 if (has_dot) {
494 double val = std::stod(num_str);
495 return SymbolicExpr::number(val);
496 } else {
497
498 long long val = std::stoll(num_str);
499 return SymbolicExpr::number(val);
500 }
501}

在文件 interval.cpp 第 534 行定义.

534 {
535 pos = skip_ws(str, pos);
536 if (pos >= str.size()) return false;
537
538 char lower_bracket = str[pos];
539 if (lower_bracket != '(' && lower_bracket != '[') return false;
540 bool lower_open = (lower_bracket == '(');
541 ++pos;
542
543 Endpoint lower;
544 if (!parse_endpoint_value(str, pos, lower)) return false;
545
546 if (!lower.is_neg_infinity && !lower.is_pos_infinity) {
547 lower.is_open = lower_open;
548 }
549
550 pos = skip_ws(str, pos);
551 if (pos >= str.size() || str[pos] != ',') return false;
552 ++pos;
553
554 Endpoint upper;
555 if (!parse_endpoint_value(str, pos, upper)) return false;
556
557 pos = skip_ws(str, pos);
558 if (pos >= str.size()) return false;
559 char upper_bracket = str[pos];
560 if (upper_bracket != ')' && upper_bracket != ']') return false;
561 bool upper_open = (upper_bracket == ')');
562 ++pos;
563
564 if (!upper.is_neg_infinity && !upper.is_pos_infinity) {
565 upper.is_open = upper_open;
566 }
567
568 iv.lower = lower;
569 iv.upper = upper;
570 return true;
571}

◆ poly_to_symbolic()

template<typename T >
std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > lamina::poly_to_symbolic ( const Polynomial< T > &  poly)

将一元多项式转换为符号表达式

模板参数
T系数类型
参数
poly一元多项式
返回
对应的符号表达式

在文件 poly_utils.hpp 第 315 行定义.

315 {
316 if (poly.is_zero()) return SymbolicExpr::number(0);
317
318 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> terms;
319
320 for (size_t i = 0; i < poly.coeffs.size(); ++i) {
321 if (poly.coeffs[i] == T(0)) continue;
322
323 auto coeff_node = SymbolicExpr::number(0);
324
325 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, BigInt>) {
326 coeff_node = SymbolicExpr::number(poly.coeffs[i]);
327 } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, Rational>) {
328 coeff_node = SymbolicExpr::number(poly.coeffs[i]);
329 } else {
330
331 coeff_node = SymbolicExpr::number(poly.coeffs[i]);
332 }
333
334 if (i == 0) {
335 terms.push_back(coeff_node);
336 } else {
337
338 auto var_node = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(std::make_shared<VariableNode>(poly.variable_name));
339 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr> var_part;
340 if (i == 1) {
341 var_part = var_node;
342 } else {
343 var_part = SymbolicExpr::power(var_node, SymbolicExpr::number((int)i));
344 }
345
346 if (poly.coeffs[i] == T(1)) {
347 terms.push_back(var_part);
348 } else if (poly.coeffs[i] == T(-1)) {
349 terms.push_back(SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(-1), var_part));
350 } else {
351 terms.push_back(SymbolicExpr::multiply(coeff_node, var_part));
352 }
353 }
354 }
355
356 std::reverse(terms.begin(), terms.end());
357
358 if (terms.empty()) return SymbolicExpr::number(0);
359 if (terms.size() == 1) return terms[0];
360
361 auto res = terms[0];
362 for (size_t i = 1; i < terms.size(); ++i) {
363 res = SymbolicExpr::add(res, terms[i]);
364 }
365 return res;
366}

◆ positive_divisors()

static std::vector< BigInt > lamina::positive_divisors ( const BigInt &  n)
static

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 580 行定义.

580 {
581 std::vector<BigInt> divs;
582 if (n.is_zero()) {
583
584 return divs;
585 }
586 BigInt abs_n = n.Abs();
587
588 BigInt i(1);
589 BigInt limit(1000);
590
591 while (i * i <= abs_n && i <= limit) {
592 BigInt rem = abs_n % i;
593 if (rem.is_zero()) {
594 divs.push_back(i);
595 BigInt counterpart = abs_n / i;
596 if (counterpart != i) {
597 divs.push_back(counterpart);
598 }
599 }
600 i = i + BigInt(1);
601 }
602
603 std::sort(divs.begin(), divs.end());
604 return divs;
605}

◆ quotient_dimension()

int lamina::quotient_dimension ( const std::vector< FGLMPoly > &  basis,
size_t  num_vars,
int  max_degree = 50 
)
inline

计算商空间维数（标准单项式个数）

参数
basisGröbner 基
num_vars变量个数
max_degree搜索的最大次数上限
返回
商空间维数；无法确定时返回 -1

在文件 fglm.hpp 第 225 行定义.

227 {
228 if (basis.empty()) return -1;
229
230 std::vector<Monomial> lead_mons;
231 for (const auto& g : basis) {
232 if (!g.is_zero()) {
233 lead_mons.push_back(g.LM());
234 }
235 }
236
237 int count = 0;
238 const int limit = 1000;
239
240 for (int d = 0; d <= max_degree && count <= limit; ++d) {
241
242 std::vector<Monomial> degree_mons;
243 Monomial current(num_vars, 0);
244
245 std::function<void(size_t, int)> generate =
246 [&](size_t var_idx, int remaining_deg) {
247 if (var_idx == num_vars - 1) {
248 current[var_idx] = remaining_deg;
249 degree_mons.push_back(current);
250 current[var_idx] = 0;
251 return;
252 }
253 for (int e = 0; e <= remaining_deg; ++e) {
254 current[var_idx] = e;
255 generate(var_idx + 1, remaining_deg - e);
256 }
257 current[var_idx] = 0;
258 };
259
260 generate(0, d);
261
262 for (const auto& m : degree_mons) {
263
264 bool divisible = false;
265 for (const auto& lm : lead_mons) {
266 if (divides_monomial(lm, m)) {
267 divisible = true;
268 break;
269 }
270 }
271 if (!divisible) {
272 ++count;
273 if (count > limit) return count;
274 }
275 }
276
277 if (degree_mons.size() > 0) {
278 bool any_standard = false;
279 for (const auto& m : degree_mons) {
280 bool divisible = false;
281 for (const auto& lm : lead_mons) {
282 if (divides_monomial(lm, m)) { divisible = true; break; }
283 }
284 if (!divisible) { any_standard = true; break; }
285 }
286 if (!any_standard && d > 0) break;
287 }
288 }
289 return count;
290}

引用了 divides_monomial().

被这些函数引用 fglm_convert().

◆ rational_reconstruction()

std::pair< int64_t, int64_t > lamina::rational_reconstruction ( int64_t  x,
int64_t  m 
)
inline

有理数重构：从模像 x mod m 恢复有理数 a/b

参数
x模像值
m模数
返回
pair(分子 a, 分母 b)；失败时返回 (0, 0)

在文件 modular_arithmetic.hpp 第 271 行定义.

271 {
272 if (m <= 0) {
273 return {0, 0};
274 }
275
276 x = ((x % m) + m) % m;
277
278 int64_t bound = static_cast<int64_t>(std::floor(std::sqrt(static_cast<double>(m) / 2.0)));
279 if (bound == 0) bound = 1;
280
281 int64_t r0 = m, r1 = x;
282 int64_t s0 = 0, s1 = 1;
283
284 while (r1 > bound) {
285 int64_t q = r0 / r1;
286 int64_t r_new = r0 - q * r1;
287 int64_t s_new = s0 - q * s1;
288
289 r0 = r1;
290 r1 = r_new;
291 s0 = s1;
292 s1 = s_new;
293 }
294
295 int64_t a = r1;
296 int64_t b = s1;
297
298 if (b < 0) {
299 a = -a;
300 b = -b;
301 }
302
303 if (std::abs(a) >= bound || b == 0 || b >= bound) {
304
305 return {0, 0};
306 }
307
308 int64_t s_unused, t_unused;
309 int64_t g = extended_gcd(std::abs(a), b, s_unused, t_unused);
310 if (g != 1) {
311 return {0, 0};
312 }
313
314 return {a, b};
315}

引用了 extended_gcd().

static std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > lamina::rewrite_exp_as_u_power ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  node,
const std::string &  var,
const std::string &  u_var 
)
static

在文件 solve_transcendental.cpp 第 863 行定义.

866 {
867
868 if (!node) return node;
869
870 int k = extract_exp_multiplier(node, var);
871 if (k > 0) {
872 auto u_node = std::make_shared<VariableNode>(u_var);
873 if (k == 1) return u_node;
874 return SymbolicFactory::create_power(u_node, std::make_shared<NumberNode>(BigInt(k)));
875 }
876
877 if (auto add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(node)) {
878 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> new_ops;
879 new_ops.reserve(add->operands.size());
880 for (auto& op : add->operands) {
881 new_ops.push_back(rewrite_exp_as_u_power(op, var, u_var));
882 }
883 return SymbolicFactory::create_add(std::move(new_ops));
884 }
885
886 if (auto mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(node)) {
887 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> new_ops;
888 new_ops.reserve(mul->operands.size());
889 for (auto& op : mul->operands) {
890 new_ops.push_back(rewrite_exp_as_u_power(op, var, u_var));
891 }
892 return SymbolicFactory::create_multiply(std::move(new_ops));
893 }
894
895 if (auto pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(node)) {
896 auto new_base = rewrite_exp_as_u_power(pow->base, var, u_var);
897 auto new_exp = rewrite_exp_as_u_power(pow->exponent, var, u_var);
898 return SymbolicFactory::create_power(new_base, new_exp);
899 }
900
901 if (auto func = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(node)) {
902 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicNode>> new_args;
903 new_args.reserve(func->arguments.size());
904 for (auto& arg : func->arguments) {
905 new_args.push_back(rewrite_exp_as_u_power(arg, var, u_var));
906 }
907 return std::make_shared<FunctionNode>(func->type, std::move(new_args));
908 }
909
910 return node;
911}

◆ rootof_evaluate()

std::optional< lmmc_real_t > lamina::rootof_evaluate ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  rootof_expr)

对 RootOf 表达式进行数值求值。

参数
rootof_exprRootOf 符号表达式
返回
若求值成功则返回数值结果，否则返回 nullopt

在文件 root_of_utils.cpp 第 139 行定义.

141{
142 if (!rootof_expr || !rootof_expr->root) return std::nullopt;
143
144 auto func_node = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(rootof_expr->root);
145 if (!func_node || func_node->type != FunctionNode::FuncType::RootOf) {
146 return std::nullopt;
147 }
148
149 if (func_node->arguments.size() != 3) {
150 return std::nullopt;
151 }
152
153 auto poly_node = func_node->arguments[0];
154 auto var_node = func_node->arguments[1];
155 auto index_node = func_node->arguments[2];
156
157 auto var_sym = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(var_node);
158 if (!var_sym) return std::nullopt;
159 std::string var = var_sym->name;
160
161 auto idx_num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(index_node);
162 if (!idx_num) return std::nullopt;
163
164 int k = 0;
165 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(idx_num->value)) {
166 k = std::get<BigInt>(idx_num->value).to_int();
167 } else if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(idx_num->value)) {
168 k = static_cast<int>(std::get<Rational>(idx_num->value).to_double());
169 } else {
170 k = static_cast<int>(std::get<lmmc_real_t>(idx_num->value));
171 }
172
173 auto poly_expr = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(poly_node);
174 auto sym_poly = symbolic_to_poly<SymbolicPolyCoeff>(poly_expr, var);
175
176 int degree = sym_poly.degree();
177 if (degree <= 0) return std::nullopt;
178
179 if (k < 0 || k >= degree) {
180 return std::nullopt;
181 }
182
183 Polynomial<Rational> rat_poly;
184 if (!try_convert_to_rational_poly(sym_poly, rat_poly)) {
185
186 return std::nullopt;
187 }
188
189 auto intervals = isolate_real_roots(rat_poly);
190
191 int num_real_roots = static_cast<int>(intervals.size());
192
193 if (k >= num_real_roots) {
194 return std::nullopt;
195 }
196
197 const auto& interval = intervals[k];
198
199 lmmc_real_t x0 = (interval.first.to_double() + interval.second.to_double()) / 2.0;
200
201 auto f_expr = poly_expr->simplify();
202 auto df_expr = f_expr->differentiate(var);
203 if (!df_expr) {
204
205 return x0;
206 }
207 df_expr = df_expr->simplify();
208
209 SolveOptions opts;
210 opts.tolerance = 1e-12;
211 opts.max_newton_iterations = 100;
212
213 auto result = newton_raphson(f_expr, df_expr, var, x0, opts);
214 if (result.has_value()) {
215 return result->value;
216 }
217
218 lmmc_real_t lo = interval.first.to_double();
219 lmmc_real_t hi = interval.second.to_double();
220
221 for (int iter = 0; iter < 200; ++iter) {
222 lmmc_real_t mid = (lo + hi) / 2.0;
223 auto fmid_expr = f_expr->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(mid));
224 lmmc_real_t fmid = fmid_expr->to_numeric();
225
226 if (std::abs(fmid) < 1e-12) {
227 return mid;
228 }
229
230 auto flo_expr = f_expr->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(lo));
231 lmmc_real_t flo = flo_expr->to_numeric();
232
233 if ((flo > 0) != (fmid > 0)) {
234 hi = mid;
235 } else {
236 lo = mid;
237 }
238 }
239
240 return (lo + hi) / 2.0;
241}
FunctionNode::FuncType::RootOf
@ RootOf
多项式根表示
