◆ rootof_simplify()

std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > lamina::rootof_simplify ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  rootof_expr)

化简 RootOf 表达式（如可用根式表示则转换为闭式）。

参数
rootof_exprRootOf 符号表达式
返回
化简后的符号表达式

在文件 root_of_utils.cpp 第 390 行定义.

392{
393 if (!rootof_expr || !rootof_expr->root) return rootof_expr;
394
395 auto func_node = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<FunctionNode>(rootof_expr->root);
396 if (!func_node || func_node->type != FunctionNode::FuncType::RootOf) {
397 return rootof_expr;
398 }
399
400 if (func_node->arguments.size() != 3) {
401 return rootof_expr;
402 }
403
404 auto poly_node = func_node->arguments[0];
405 auto var_node = func_node->arguments[1];
406 auto index_node = func_node->arguments[2];
407
408 auto var_sym = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(var_node);
409 if (!var_sym) return rootof_expr;
410 std::string var = var_sym->name;
411
412 auto idx_num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(index_node);
413 if (!idx_num) return rootof_expr;
414
415 int k = 0;
416 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(idx_num->value)) {
417 k = std::get<BigInt>(idx_num->value).to_int();
418 } else if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(idx_num->value)) {
419 k = static_cast<int>(std::get<Rational>(idx_num->value).to_double());
420 } else {
421 k = static_cast<int>(std::get<lmmc_real_t>(idx_num->value));
422 }
423
424 auto poly_expr = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(poly_node);
425 auto sym_poly = symbolic_to_poly<SymbolicPolyCoeff>(poly_expr, var);
426
427 int degree = sym_poly.degree();
428 if (degree <= 0) return rootof_expr;
429
430 if (k < 0 || k >= degree) {
431 return rootof_expr;
432 }
433
434 if (degree <= 4) {
435 auto roots = solve_closed_form_from_poly(sym_poly, var);
436 if (roots.empty()) {
437 return rootof_expr;
438 }
439
440 auto sorted_roots = sort_roots_by_convention(roots);
441
442 if (k >= 0 && k < static_cast<int>(sorted_roots.size())) {
443 return sorted_roots[k];
444 }
445
446 return rootof_expr;
447 }
448
449 return rootof_expr;
450}

std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::solve_biquadratic ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  a,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  b,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  c,
const std::string &  var 
)

求解双二次方程 ax⁴ + bx² + c = 0。

参数
a四次项系数
b二次项系数
c常数项
var求解变量名
返回
所有根的符号表达式列表

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 238 行定义.

242 {
243
244 bool all_numeric = is_purely_numeric(a) && is_purely_numeric(b) && is_purely_numeric(c);
245
246 if (all_numeric) {
247
248 double av = a->to_numeric();
249 double bv = b->to_numeric();
250 double cv = c->to_numeric();
251
252 double disc = bv * bv - 4.0 * av * cv;
253 double sqrt_disc = std::sqrt(std::abs(disc));
254
255 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
256 const double eps = 1e-12;
257
258 if (disc >= -eps) {
259 double u1 = (-bv + sqrt_disc) / (2.0 * av);
260 double u2 = (-bv - sqrt_disc) / (2.0 * av);
261
262 double u_vals[2] = {u1, u2};
263 for (int i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
264 if (u_vals[i] >= -eps) {
265 double x_pos = std::sqrt(std::max(0.0, u_vals[i]));
266 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(x_pos));
267 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(-x_pos));
268 } else {
269
270 auto u_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(u_vals[i]);
271 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u_expr)->simplify());
272 results.push_back(negate(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u_expr))->simplify());
273 }
274 }
275 } else {
276
277 auto u_roots = solve_quadratic_internal(a, b, c);
278 for (const auto& u : u_roots) {
279 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u)->simplify());
280 results.push_back(negate(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u))->simplify());
281 }
282 }
283
284 return results;
285 }
286
287 auto u_roots = solve_quadratic_internal(a, b, c);
288
289 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
290 for (const auto& u : u_roots) {
291 auto pos_root = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u)->simplify();
292 auto neg_root = negate(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u))->simplify();
293 results.push_back(pos_root);
294 results.push_back(neg_root);
295 }
296
297 return results;
298}

std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::solve_by_factoring ( const Polynomial< SymbolicPolyCoeff > &  poly,
const std::string &  var 
)

通过因式分解求解多项式方程。

参数
poly符号系数多项式
var求解变量名
返回
所有根的符号表达式列表

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 755 行定义.

757 {
758
759 if (poly.is_zero() || poly.degree() < 1) return {};
760
761 if (poly.degree() <= 4) {
762 return solve_closed_form_poly(poly, var);
763 }
764
765 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
766
767 Polynomial<Rational> rat_poly;
768 if (!convert_to_rational_poly(poly, rat_poly)) {
769
770 return make_rootof_solutions(poly, var);
771 }
772
773 auto rational_roots = find_rational_roots(rat_poly);
774
775 for (const auto& r : rational_roots) {
776 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(r));
777 }
778
779 Polynomial<Rational> quotient = rat_poly;
780 for (const auto& r : rational_roots) {
781 Polynomial<Rational> linear_factor({-r, Rational(1)}, var);
782 auto [q, rem] = quotient.div_mod(linear_factor);
783 quotient = q;
784 }
785
786 if (quotient.degree() <= 0) {
787 return results;
788 }
789
790 if (quotient.degree() <= 4) {
791 auto sym_quotient = rational_to_symbolic_poly(quotient);
792 auto factor_roots = solve_closed_form_poly(sym_quotient, var);
793 results.insert(results.end(), factor_roots.begin(), factor_roots.end());
794 return results;
795 }
796
797 auto sqfree_factors = square_free_factorization(quotient);
798
799 for (const auto& [factor, multiplicity] : sqfree_factors) {
800 if (factor.degree() <= 0) continue;
801
802 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> factor_solutions;
803
804 if (factor.degree() <= 4) {
805
806 auto sym_factor = rational_to_symbolic_poly(factor);
807 factor_solutions = solve_closed_form_poly(sym_factor, var);
808 } else {
809
810 auto sym_factor = rational_to_symbolic_poly(factor);
811 factor_solutions = make_rootof_solutions(sym_factor, var);
812 }
813
814 for (int m = 0; m < multiplicity; ++m) {
815 results.insert(results.end(), factor_solutions.begin(), factor_solutions.end());
816 }
817 }
818
819 return results;
820}

在文件 root_of_utils.cpp 第 270 行定义.

273{
274 int deg = poly.degree();
275 if (deg <= 0) return {};
276
277 auto get_coeff = [&](int d) -> std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr> {
278 if (d < 0 || d > deg) return SymbolicExpr::number(0);
279 return poly.coeffs[d].val ? poly.coeffs[d].val : SymbolicExpr::number(0);
280 };
281
282 if (deg == 1) {
283
284 auto a = get_coeff(1);
285 auto b = get_coeff(0);
286 auto neg_b = SymbolicExpr::multiply(b, SymbolicExpr::number(-1));
287 return { SymbolicExpr::divide(neg_b, a)->simplify() };
288 } else if (deg == 2) {
289 auto a = get_coeff(2);
290 auto b = get_coeff(1);
291 auto c = get_coeff(0);
292
293 auto b2 = SymbolicExpr::power(b, SymbolicExpr::number(2));
294 auto four_ac = SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(4), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a, c));
295 auto delta = SymbolicExpr::add(b2, SymbolicExpr::multiply(four_ac, SymbolicExpr::number(-1)));
296 auto sqrt_delta = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(delta);
297 auto neg_b = SymbolicExpr::multiply(b, SymbolicExpr::number(-1));
298 auto two_a = SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(2), a);
299
300 auto x1 = SymbolicExpr::divide(SymbolicExpr::add(neg_b, sqrt_delta), two_a)->simplify();
301 auto x2 = SymbolicExpr::divide(SymbolicExpr::add(neg_b, SymbolicExpr::multiply(sqrt_delta, SymbolicExpr::number(-1))), two_a)->simplify();
302 return { x1, x2 };
303 } else if (deg == 3) {
304 auto a = get_coeff(3);
305 auto b = get_coeff(2);
306 auto c = get_coeff(1);
307 auto d = get_coeff(0);
308 return solve_cubic(a, b, c, d, var);
309 } else if (deg == 4) {
310 auto a = get_coeff(4);
311 auto b = get_coeff(3);
312 auto c = get_coeff(2);
313 auto d = get_coeff(1);
314 auto e = get_coeff(0);
315 return solve_quartic(a, b, c, d, e, var);
316 }
317
318 return {};
319}

std::vector< ComplexSymbolic > lamina::solve_complex_nth_root ( std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr >  c,
int  n 
)

求复数 c 的 n 次方根

参数
c被开方的复数表达式
n根的次数
返回
n 个复数根的列表

在文件 symbolic_complex.cpp 第 51 行定义.

51 {
52
53 if (n <= 0) {
54 throw std::invalid_argument("solve_complex_nth_root: n must be > 0");
55 }
56
57 ComplexSymbolic c_sym{SymbolicExpr::number(0), SymbolicExpr::number(0)};
58
59 if (c->is_number()) {
60 double val = c->to_numeric();
61 double r = std::abs(val);
62 double theta = std::arg(std::complex<double>(val, 0.0));
63 std::vector<ComplexSymbolic> roots;
64 for (int k = 0; k < n; ++k) {
65 double root_r = std::pow(r, 1.0 / n);
66 double root_theta = (theta + 2 * M_PI * k) / n;
67 roots.push_back(complex_exp_form(SymbolicExpr::number(root_r), SymbolicExpr::number(root_theta)));
68 }
69 return roots;
70 }
71 return {};
72}

97 if (b_simp->get_number_value_is_zero()) {
98
99 return solve_linear_internal(c, d);
100 }
101
102 return solve_quadratic_internal(b, c, d);
103 }
104
105 auto a2 = SymbolicExpr::power(a, num(2));
106 auto a3 = SymbolicExpr::power(a, num(3));
107 auto b2 = SymbolicExpr::power(b, num(2));
108 auto b3 = SymbolicExpr::power(b, num(3));
109
110 auto three_ac = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(3), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a, c));
111 auto p_num = sub(three_ac, b2);
112 auto p_den = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(3), a2);
113 auto p = SymbolicExpr::divide(p_num, p_den)->simplify();
114
115 auto two_b3 = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(2), b3);
116 auto nine_abc = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(9), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a, SymbolicExpr::multiply(b, c)));
117 auto twentyseven_a2d = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(27), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a2, d));
118 auto q_num = SymbolicExpr::add(sub(two_b3, nine_abc), twentyseven_a2d);
119 auto q_den = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(27), a3);
120 auto q = SymbolicExpr::divide(q_num, q_den)->simplify();
121
122 auto shift = SymbolicExpr::divide(b, SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(3), a))->simplify();
123
124 bool all_numeric = is_purely_numeric(p) && is_purely_numeric(q);
125
126 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> roots;
127
128 if (all_numeric) {
129
130 double p_val = p->to_numeric();
131 double q_val = q->to_numeric();
132
133 double D = (q_val / 2.0) * (q_val / 2.0) + (p_val / 3.0) * (p_val / 3.0) * (p_val / 3.0);
134
135 const double eps = 1e-12;
136
137 if (std::abs(p_val) < eps && std::abs(q_val) < eps) {
138
139 double shift_val = shift->to_numeric();
140 auto root = SymbolicExpr::number(-shift_val);
141 roots = { root, root, root };
142 } else if (std::abs(D) < eps) {
143
144 double q_half_val = q_val / 2.0;
145 double cbrt_q_half_val = std::cbrt(q_half_val);
146 double shift_val = shift->to_numeric();
147
148 double t1_val = -2.0 * cbrt_q_half_val;
149
150 double t2_val = cbrt_q_half_val;
151
152 auto x1 = SymbolicExpr::number(t1_val - shift_val);
153 auto x2 = SymbolicExpr::number(t2_val - shift_val);
154
155 roots = { x1, x2, x2 };
156 } else if (D > eps) {
157
158 double neg_q_half_val = -q_val / 2.0;
159 double sqrt_D_val = std::sqrt(D);
160
161 double u_arg_val = neg_q_half_val + sqrt_D_val;
162 double v_arg_val = neg_q_half_val - sqrt_D_val;
163
164 double u_val = std::cbrt(u_arg_val);
165 double v_val = std::cbrt(v_arg_val);
166
167 double shift_val = shift->to_numeric();
168
169 double t1_val = u_val + v_val;
170 double x1_val = t1_val - shift_val;
171
172 double real_part = -(u_val + v_val) / 2.0 - shift_val;
173 double imag_part_val = std::sqrt(3.0) * (u_val - v_val) / 2.0;
174
175 auto x1 = SymbolicExpr::number(x1_val);
176
177 auto i_unit = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(num(-1));
178 auto x2 = SymbolicExpr::add(
179 SymbolicExpr::number(real_part),
180 SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(imag_part_val), i_unit))->simplify();
181 auto x3 = sub(
182 SymbolicExpr::number(real_part),
183 SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(imag_part_val), i_unit))->simplify();
184
185 roots = { x1, x2, x3 };
186 } else {
187
188 double neg_p3_over_27 = -(p_val * p_val * p_val) / 27.0;
189 double r_val = std::sqrt(neg_p3_over_27);
190 double cos_arg = -q_val / (2.0 * r_val);
191
192 if (cos_arg > 1.0) cos_arg = 1.0;
193 if (cos_arg < -1.0) cos_arg = -1.0;
194 double theta_val = std::acos(cos_arg);
195 double two_cbrt_r = 2.0 * std::cbrt(r_val);
196
197 double shift_val = shift->to_numeric();
198
199 for (int k = 0; k < 3; ++k) {
200 double angle = (theta_val + 2.0 * k * M_PI) / 3.0;
201 double t_k_val = two_cbrt_r * std::cos(angle);
202 double x_k_val = t_k_val - shift_val;
203 roots.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(x_k_val));
204 }
205 }
206 } else {
207
208 auto q_half = SymbolicExpr::divide(q, num(2));
209 auto p_third = SymbolicExpr::divide(p, num(3));
210 auto D_expr = SymbolicExpr::add(
211 SymbolicExpr::power(q_half, num(2)),
212 SymbolicExpr::power(p_third, num(3)))->simplify();
213
214 auto neg_q_half = negate(q_half)->simplify();
215 auto sqrt_D = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(D_expr);
216
217 auto u = cbrt_expr(SymbolicExpr::add(neg_q_half, sqrt_D))->simplify();
218 auto v = cbrt_expr(sub(neg_q_half, sqrt_D))->simplify();
219
220 auto t1 = SymbolicExpr::add(u, v);
221 auto x1 = sub(t1, shift)->simplify();
222
223 auto neg_half_sum = SymbolicExpr::divide(negate(SymbolicExpr::add(u, v)), num(2));
224 auto diff_uv = sub(u, v);
225 auto sqrt3_half = SymbolicExpr::divide(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(num(3)), num(2));
226 auto imag_coeff = SymbolicExpr::multiply(sqrt3_half, diff_uv);
227
228 auto i_unit = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(num(-1));
229 auto x2 = sub(SymbolicExpr::add(neg_half_sum, SymbolicExpr::multiply(i_unit, imag_coeff)), shift)->simplify();
230 auto x3 = sub(sub(neg_half_sum, SymbolicExpr::multiply(i_unit, imag_coeff)), shift)->simplify();
231
232 roots = { x1, x2, x3 };
233 }
234
235 return roots;
236}

const std::string &  var,

)

方程求解策略调度器，根据表达式类型选择合适的求解方法。

参数
expr待求解的表达式（视为等于零）
var求解变量名
opts求解选项
返回
所有根的符号表达式列表

在文件 solve_visitor.cpp 第 81 行定义.

84 {
85
86 if (!expr) return {};
87
88 auto simplified = expr->simplify();
89 if (!simplified) return {};
90
91 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr> f_expr = simplified;
92 if (auto rel = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<RelationalNode>(simplified->root)) {
93 if (rel->op == RelationalNode::Op::EQ) {
94 auto L = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(rel->left);
95 auto R = std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(rel->right);
96 f_expr = SymbolicExpr::add(L, SymbolicExpr::multiply(R, SymbolicExpr::number(-1)));
97 }
98 }
99
100 auto poly = symbolic_to_poly<SymbolicPolyCoeff>(f_expr, var);
101 if (!poly.is_zero() && poly.degree() >= 1) {
102
103 if (poly.degree() <= 4) {
104 auto results = solve_polynomial_closed(poly, var);
105 if (!results.empty()) return results;
106 }
107
108 if (poly.degree() > 4) {
109 auto results = solve_by_factoring(poly, var);
110 if (!results.empty()) return results;
111
112 if (opts.return_rootof) {
113 return make_rootof_solutions(poly, var);
114 }
115 }
116 }
117
118 auto trans_results = solve_transcendental(f_expr, var);
119 if (!trans_results.empty()) return trans_results;
120
121 if (opts.allow_numeric) {
122 auto numeric_roots = solve_numeric(f_expr, var, opts);
123 if (!numeric_roots.empty()) {
124
125 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
126 results.reserve(numeric_roots.size());
127 for (const auto& nr : numeric_roots) {
128 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(nr.value));
129 }
130 return results;
131 }
132 }
133
134 return {};
135}

std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > lamina::solve_linear2_ode ( double  a,
double  b,
double  c,
std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr >  fx,
const std::string &  x,
const std::string &  y 
)

求解二阶常系数线性 ODE：a*y'' + b*y' + c*y = f(x)

参数
a二阶导数系数
b一阶导数系数
c零阶项系数
fx非齐次项 f(x)
x自变量名
y因变量名
返回
通解的符号表达式

在文件 symbolic_ode.cpp 第 43 行定义.

48 {
49
50 // Guard a == 0: equation degenerates to first-order (or constant) form.
51 int a_is_zero = 0;
52 lmmc_double_nearly_equal_tol(a, 0.0, 1e-12, 1e-12, &a_is_zero);
53 if (a_is_zero) {
54 int b_is_zero = 0;
55 lmmc_double_nearly_equal_tol(b, 0.0, 1e-12, 1e-12, &b_is_zero);
56 if (b_is_zero) {
57 // a == 0 and b == 0: not a proper second-order ODE.
58 throw std::invalid_argument(
59 "solve_linear2_ode: leading and first-derivative coefficients are both zero");
60 }
61 // a == 0, b != 0: degenerates to b*y' + c*y = f(x), i.e. y' + (c/b)*y = f/b.
62 auto Px = SymbolicExpr::number(c / b);
63 auto Qx = fx->is_zero()
64 ? SymbolicExpr::number(0)
65 : SymbolicExpr::divide(fx, SymbolicExpr::number(b));
66 return solve_linear1_ode(Px, Qx, x, y);
67 }
68
69 double D = b*b - 4*a*c;
70 auto C1 = SymbolicExpr::variable("C1");
71 auto C2 = SymbolicExpr::variable("C2");
72 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr> yh;
73 int eq;
74 lmmc_double_nearly_equal_tol(D, 0.0, 1e-12, 1e-12, &eq);
75 if (!eq && D > 0) {
76 double r1 = (-b + std::sqrt(D)) / (2*a);
77 double r2 = (-b - std::sqrt(D)) / (2*a);
78 yh = SymbolicExpr::add(
79 SymbolicExpr::multiply(C1, SymbolicExpr::exp(SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(r1), SymbolicExpr::variable(x)))),
80 SymbolicExpr::multiply(C2, SymbolicExpr::exp(SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(r2), SymbolicExpr::variable(x))))
81 );
82 } else if (eq) {
83 double r = -b / (2*a);
84 yh = SymbolicExpr::add(
85 SymbolicExpr::multiply(C1, SymbolicExpr::exp(SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(r), SymbolicExpr::variable(x)))),
86 SymbolicExpr::multiply(C2, SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::variable(x), SymbolicExpr::exp(SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(r), SymbolicExpr::variable(x)))))
87 );
88 } else {
89 double real = -b / (2*a);
90 double imag = std::sqrt(-D) / (2*a);
91
92 auto exp_part = SymbolicExpr::exp(SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(real), SymbolicExpr::variable(x)));
93 auto cos_part = SymbolicExpr::cos(SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(imag), SymbolicExpr::variable(x)));
94 auto sin_part = SymbolicExpr::sin(SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(imag), SymbolicExpr::variable(x)));
95 yh = SymbolicExpr::multiply(exp_part, SymbolicExpr::add(SymbolicExpr::multiply(C1, cos_part), SymbolicExpr::multiply(C2, sin_part)));
96 }
97
98 if (!fx->is_zero()) {
99 // Particular-solution computation for non-homogeneous case is not yet
100 // implemented. Fail loudly instead of returning the homogeneous solution
101 // disguised as the full general solution.
102 throw std::logic_error(
103 "solve_linear2_ode: non-homogeneous case (f(x) != 0) is not implemented");
104 }
105 return yh;
106}

◆ solve_numeric()

std::vector< NumericRoot > lamina::solve_numeric ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  expr,
const std::string &  var,
const SolveOptions &  opts = {} 
)

对表达式进行数值求根，综合使用 Newton-Raphson 和根隔离方法。

参数
expr待求根的表达式（视为等于零）
var求解变量名
opts求解选项（容差、最大迭代次数等）
返回
数值根列表

在文件 newton_raphson.cpp 第 318 行定义.

322{
323 std::vector<NumericRoot> results;
324
325 auto poly = symbolic_to_poly<Rational>(expr, var);
326
327 if (!poly.is_zero() && poly.degree() >= 1) {
328
329 Polynomial<Rational> current_poly = poly;
330
331 auto df_expr = expr->differentiate(var);
332
333 while (current_poly.degree() >= 1) {
334
335 auto intervals = isolate_real_roots(current_poly);
336
337 if (intervals.empty()) {
338 break;
339 }
340
341 bool found_any = false;
342 for (const auto& [lo_rat, hi_rat] : intervals) {
343
344 if (opts.max_roots > 0 && (int)results.size() >= opts.max_roots) {
345 return results;
346 }
347
348 lmmc_real_t lo = lo_rat.to_double();
349 lmmc_real_t hi = hi_rat.to_double();
350 lmmc_real_t x0 = (lo + hi) * 0.5;
351
352 auto current_expr = poly_to_symbolic(current_poly);
353 auto current_df = current_expr->differentiate(var);
354
355 auto root_opt = newton_raphson(current_expr, current_df, var,
356 x0, lo, hi, opts);
357
358 if (root_opt.has_value()) {
359 NumericRoot root = root_opt.value();
360
361 auto check = expr->substitute(var, SymbolicExpr::number(root.value));
362 lmmc_real_t residual = std::abs(check->to_numeric());
363 root.residual = residual;
364
365 if (residual < opts.tolerance * 1000) {
366 results.push_back(root);
367 found_any = true;
368
369 Rational r_rat = Rational::from_double(root.value);
370 Polynomial<Rational> linear_factor({-r_rat, Rational(1)},
371 current_poly.variable_name);
372 auto [quotient, remainder] = current_poly.div_mod(linear_factor);
373
374 if (!remainder.is_zero()) {
375
376 int deg = current_poly.degree();
377 std::vector<Rational> new_coeffs(deg);
378
379 new_coeffs[deg - 1] = current_poly.coeffs[deg];
380 for (int i = deg - 2; i >= 0; --i) {
381 new_coeffs[i] = current_poly.coeffs[i + 1] + new_coeffs[i + 1] * r_rat;
382 }
383 quotient = Polynomial<Rational>(new_coeffs, current_poly.variable_name);
384 }
385
386 current_poly = quotient;
387 break;
388 }
389 }
390 }
391
392 if (!found_any) {
393 break;
394 }
395 }
396 } else {
397
398 lmmc_real_t x0 = opts.has_initial_guess ? opts.initial_guess : 0.0;
399
400 auto df_expr = expr->differentiate(var);
401
402 auto root_opt = newton_raphson(expr, df_expr, var, x0, opts);
403
404 if (root_opt.has_value()) {
405 NumericRoot root = root_opt.value();
406
407 if (root.residual < opts.tolerance) {
408 results.push_back(root);
409 }
410 }
411 }
412
413 return results;
414}

◆ solve_quadratic_internal()

static std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::solve_quadratic_internal ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  a,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  b,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  c 
)
static

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 67 行定义.

70 {
71
72 auto b2 = SymbolicExpr::power(b, num(2));
73 auto four_ac = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(4), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a, c));
74 auto delta = sub(b2, four_ac);
75
76 auto sqrt_delta = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(delta);
77 auto neg_b = negate(b);
78 auto two_a = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(2), a);
79
80 auto x1 = SymbolicExpr::divide(SymbolicExpr::add(neg_b, sqrt_delta), two_a)->simplify();
81 auto x2 = SymbolicExpr::divide(sub(neg_b, sqrt_delta), two_a)->simplify();
82
83 return { x1, x2 };
84}

引用了 SymbolicExpr::add(), SymbolicExpr::divide(), SymbolicExpr::multiply(), negate(), num(), SymbolicExpr::power(), SymbolicExpr::sqrt() , 以及 sub().

◆ solve_quartic()

std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::solve_quartic ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  a,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  b,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  c,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  d,
const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  e,
const std::string &  var 
)

使用四次公式求解四次方程 ax⁴ + bx³ + cx² + dx + e = 0。

参数
a四次项系数
b三次项系数
c二次项系数
d一次项系数
e常数项
var求解变量名
返回
所有根的符号表达式列表

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 300 行定义.

306 {
307
308 auto a_simp = a->simplify();
309 if (a_simp->get_number_value_is_zero()) {
310
311 return solve_cubic(b, c, d, e, var);
312 }
313
314 auto b_simp = b->simplify();
315 auto d_simp = d->simplify();
316 if (b_simp->get_number_value_is_zero() && d_simp->get_number_value_is_zero()) {
317 return solve_biquadratic(a, c, e, var);
318 }
319
320 bool all_numeric = is_purely_numeric(a) && is_purely_numeric(b) &&
321 is_purely_numeric(c) && is_purely_numeric(d) && is_purely_numeric(e);
322
323 if (all_numeric) {
324
325 double av = a->to_numeric();
326 double bv = b->to_numeric();
327 double cv = c->to_numeric();
328 double dv = d->to_numeric();
329 double ev = e->to_numeric();
330
331 double shift_val = bv / (4.0 * av);
332 double p_val = (8.0*av*cv - 3.0*bv*bv) / (8.0*av*av);
333 double q_val = (bv*bv*bv - 4.0*av*bv*cv + 8.0*av*av*dv) / (8.0*av*av*av);
334 double r_val = (-3.0*bv*bv*bv*bv + 256.0*av*av*av*ev - 64.0*av*av*bv*dv + 16.0*av*bv*bv*cv) / (256.0*av*av*av*av);
335
336 const double eps = 1e-12;
337
338 if (std::abs(q_val) < eps) {
339
340 double disc = p_val * p_val - 4.0 * r_val;
341 double sqrt_disc = std::sqrt(std::abs(disc));
342 double u1, u2;
343 if (disc >= 0) {
344 u1 = (-p_val + sqrt_disc) / 2.0;
345 u2 = (-p_val - sqrt_disc) / 2.0;
346 } else {
347
348 u1 = (-p_val + sqrt_disc) / 2.0;
349 u2 = (-p_val - sqrt_disc) / 2.0;
350 }
351
352 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
353 double u_vals[2] = {u1, u2};
354 for (int i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
355 if (u_vals[i] >= -eps) {
356 double y_pos = std::sqrt(std::max(0.0, u_vals[i]));
357 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(y_pos - shift_val));
358 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(-y_pos - shift_val));
359 } else {
360
361 auto u_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(u_vals[i]);
362 auto shift_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(shift_val);
363 results.push_back(sub(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u_expr), shift_expr)->simplify());
364 results.push_back(sub(negate(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u_expr)), shift_expr)->simplify());
365 }
366 }
367 return results;
368 }
369
370 double rc_a = 8.0;
371 double rc_b = 8.0 * p_val;
372 double rc_c = 2.0 * p_val * p_val - 8.0 * r_val;
373 double rc_d = -(q_val * q_val);
374
375 auto cubic_roots = solve_cubic(
376 SymbolicExpr::number(rc_a),
377 SymbolicExpr::number(rc_b),
378 SymbolicExpr::number(rc_c),
379 SymbolicExpr::number(rc_d),
380 var);
381
382 double m_val = 0.0;
383 bool found_m = false;
384
385 for (const auto& root : cubic_roots) {
386 double val = root->to_numeric();
387 if (std::isfinite(val) && val > eps) {
388 if (!found_m || val > m_val) {
389 m_val = val;
390 found_m = true;
391 }
392 }
393 }
394
395 if (!found_m) {
396 for (const auto& root : cubic_roots) {
397 double val = root->to_numeric();
398 if (std::isfinite(val) && std::abs(val) > eps) {
399 if (!found_m || std::abs(val) > std::abs(m_val)) {
400 m_val = val;
401 found_m = true;
402 }
403 }
404 }
405 }
406
407 if (!found_m && !cubic_roots.empty()) {
408 m_val = cubic_roots[0]->to_numeric();
409 found_m = true;
410 }
411
412 if (!found_m) return {};
413
414 if (m_val < 0) {
415
416 double abs_2m = std::abs(2.0 * m_val);
417 double s_abs = std::sqrt(abs_2m);
418
419 auto shift_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(shift_val);
420 auto m_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(m_val);
421 auto p_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(p_val);
422 auto q_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(q_val);
423 auto two_m_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(2.0 * m_val);
424 auto s_expr = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(two_m_expr);
425 auto p_half_expr = SymbolicExpr::number(p_val / 2.0);
426 auto m_plus_p_half = SymbolicExpr::number(m_val + p_val / 2.0);
427 auto q_over_2s = SymbolicExpr::divide(q_expr, SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(2), s_expr));
428
429 auto quad1_c_expr = sub(m_plus_p_half, q_over_2s)->simplify();
430 auto quad2_c_expr = SymbolicExpr::add(m_plus_p_half, q_over_2s)->simplify();
431
432 auto y_roots1 = solve_quadratic_internal(num(1), s_expr, quad1_c_expr);
433 auto neg_s_expr = negate(s_expr);
434 auto y_roots2 = solve_quadratic_internal(num(1), neg_s_expr, quad2_c_expr);
435
436 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
437 for (const auto& y : y_roots1) {
438 results.push_back(sub(y, shift_expr)->simplify());
439 }
440 for (const auto& y : y_roots2) {
441 results.push_back(sub(y, shift_expr)->simplify());
442 }
443 return results;
444 }
445
446 double s_val = std::sqrt(2.0 * m_val);
447
448 double quad1_c_val = m_val + p_val / 2.0 - q_val / (2.0 * s_val);
449
450 double quad2_c_val = m_val + p_val / 2.0 + q_val / (2.0 * s_val);
451
452 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
453
454 double disc1 = s_val * s_val - 4.0 * quad1_c_val;
455 if (disc1 >= -eps) {
456 double sqrt_disc1 = std::sqrt(std::max(0.0, disc1));
457 double y1 = (-s_val + sqrt_disc1) / 2.0;
458 double y2 = (-s_val - sqrt_disc1) / 2.0;
459 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(y1 - shift_val));
460 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(y2 - shift_val));
461 } else {
462
463 double real_part = -s_val / 2.0 - shift_val;
464 double imag_part = std::sqrt(-disc1) / 2.0;
465 auto i_unit = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(num(-1));
466 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::add(
467 SymbolicExpr::number(real_part),
468 SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(imag_part), i_unit))->simplify());
469 results.push_back(sub(
470 SymbolicExpr::number(real_part),
471 SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(imag_part), i_unit))->simplify());
472 }
473
474 double disc2 = s_val * s_val - 4.0 * quad2_c_val;
475 if (disc2 >= -eps) {
476 double sqrt_disc2 = std::sqrt(std::max(0.0, disc2));
477 double y3 = (s_val + sqrt_disc2) / 2.0;
478 double y4 = (s_val - sqrt_disc2) / 2.0;
479 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(y3 - shift_val));
480 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::number(y4 - shift_val));
481 } else {
482
483 double real_part = s_val / 2.0 - shift_val;
484 double imag_part = std::sqrt(-disc2) / 2.0;
485 auto i_unit = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(num(-1));
486 results.push_back(SymbolicExpr::add(
487 SymbolicExpr::number(real_part),
488 SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(imag_part), i_unit))->simplify());
489 results.push_back(sub(
490 SymbolicExpr::number(real_part),
491 SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(imag_part), i_unit))->simplify());
492 }
493
494 return results;
495 }
496
497 auto a2 = SymbolicExpr::power(a, num(2));
498 auto a3 = SymbolicExpr::power(a, num(3));
499 auto a4 = SymbolicExpr::power(a, num(4));
500 auto b2 = SymbolicExpr::power(b, num(2));
501 auto b3 = SymbolicExpr::power(b, num(3));
502 auto b4 = SymbolicExpr::power(b, num(4));
503
504 auto eight_ac = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(8), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a, c));
505 auto three_b2 = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(3), b2);
506 auto p = SymbolicExpr::divide(sub(eight_ac, three_b2), SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(8), a2))->simplify();
507
508 auto four_abc = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(4), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a, SymbolicExpr::multiply(b, c)));
509 auto eight_a2d = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(8), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a2, d));
510 auto q_num = SymbolicExpr::add(sub(b3, four_abc), eight_a2d);
511 auto q = SymbolicExpr::divide(q_num, SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(8), a3))->simplify();
512
513 auto neg3_b4 = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(-3), b4);
514 auto t256_a3e = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(256), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a3, e));
515 auto neg64_a2bd = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(-64), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a2, SymbolicExpr::multiply(b, d)));
516 auto t16_ab2c = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(16), SymbolicExpr::multiply(a, SymbolicExpr::multiply(b2, c)));
517 auto r_num = SymbolicExpr::add(SymbolicExpr::add(SymbolicExpr::add(neg3_b4, t256_a3e), neg64_a2bd), t16_ab2c);
518 auto r = SymbolicExpr::divide(r_num, SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(256), a4))->simplify();
519
520 auto shift = SymbolicExpr::divide(b, SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(4), a))->simplify();
521
522 auto q_simp = q->simplify();
523 if (q_simp->get_number_value_is_zero()) {
524
525 auto u_roots = solve_quadratic_internal(num(1), p, r);
526 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
527 for (const auto& u : u_roots) {
528
529 auto pos_y = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u)->simplify();
530 auto neg_y = negate(SymbolicExpr::sqrt(u))->simplify();
531 results.push_back(sub(pos_y, shift)->simplify());
532 results.push_back(sub(neg_y, shift)->simplify());
533 }
534 return results;
535 }
536
537 auto p2 = SymbolicExpr::power(p, num(2));
538 auto q2 = SymbolicExpr::power(q, num(2));
539 auto eight_p = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(8), p);
540 auto two_p2_minus_8r = sub(SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(2), p2), SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(8), r))->simplify();
541 auto neg_q2 = negate(q2)->simplify();
542
543 auto cubic_roots = solve_cubic(num(8), eight_p, two_p2_minus_8r, neg_q2, var);
544
545 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr> m = nullptr;
546 if (!cubic_roots.empty()) {
547 m = cubic_roots[0];
548 }
549
550 if (!m) return {};
551
552 auto two_m = SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(2), m);
553 auto s = SymbolicExpr::sqrt(two_m)->simplify();
554
555 auto p_half = SymbolicExpr::divide(p, num(2))->simplify();
556
557 auto m_plus_p_half = SymbolicExpr::add(m, p_half)->simplify();
558
559 auto q_over_2s = SymbolicExpr::divide(q, SymbolicExpr::multiply(num(2), s))->simplify();
560
561 auto quad1_c = sub(m_plus_p_half, q_over_2s)->simplify();
562
563 auto neg_s = negate(s)->simplify();
564 auto quad2_c = SymbolicExpr::add(m_plus_p_half, q_over_2s)->simplify();
565
566 auto y_roots1 = solve_quadratic_internal(num(1), s, quad1_c);
567 auto y_roots2 = solve_quadratic_internal(num(1), neg_s, quad2_c);
568
569 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
570 for (const auto& y : y_roots1) {
571 results.push_back(sub(y, shift)->simplify());
572 }
573 for (const auto& y : y_roots2) {
574 results.push_back(sub(y, shift)->simplify());
575 }
576
577 return results;
578}

引用了 SymbolicExpr::add(), SymbolicExpr::divide(), is_purely_numeric(), SymbolicExpr::multiply(), negate(), num(), SymbolicExpr::number(), SymbolicExpr::power(), solve_biquadratic(), solve_cubic(), solve_quadratic_internal(), SymbolicExpr::sqrt() , 以及 sub().

◆ solve_separable_ode()

std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > lamina::solve_separable_ode ( std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr >  rhs,
const std::string &  x,
const std::string &  y 
)

求解可分离变量型 ODE：dy/dx = rhs(x, y)

参数
rhs方程右端表达式
x自变量名
y因变量名
返回
通解的符号表达式

在文件 symbolic_ode.cpp 第 12 行定义.

16 {
17
18 auto inv_y = SymbolicExpr::divide(SymbolicExpr::number(1), rhs);
19 auto int_y = inv_y->integrate(y);
20 auto int_x = SymbolicExpr::number(1)->integrate(x);
21
22 return SymbolicExpr::add(int_y, SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(-1), int_x));
23}

)
static

在文件 inequality_solver.cpp 第 651 行定义.

653 {
654
655 if (poly.is_zero() || poly.degree() < 1) return {};
656
657 int deg = poly.degree();
658 auto get_coeff = [&](int d) -> std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr> {
659 if (d < 0 || d > deg) return SymbolicExpr::number(0);
660 return poly.coeffs[d].val ? poly.coeffs[d].val : SymbolicExpr::number(0);
661 };
662
663 if (deg == 1) {
664
665 auto a = get_coeff(1);
666 auto b = get_coeff(0);
667 auto neg_b = SymbolicExpr::multiply(b, SymbolicExpr::number(-1));
668 auto root = SymbolicExpr::divide(neg_b, a)->simplify();
669 return { root };
670 }
671
672 auto results = solve_by_factoring(poly, variable);
673 return results;
674}

引用了 lamina::Polynomial< CoeffType >::coeffs, lamina::Polynomial< CoeffType >::degree(), SymbolicExpr::divide(), get_coeff(), lamina::Polynomial< CoeffType >::is_zero(), SymbolicExpr::multiply(), SymbolicExpr::number() , 以及 solve_by_factoring().

◆ solve_transcendental_impl()

static std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::solve_transcendental_impl ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  expr,
const std::string &  var,
int  depth 
)
static

在文件 solve_transcendental.cpp 第 642 行定义.

645 {
646
647 if (!expr || !expr->root) return {};
648
649 if (depth > MAX_TRANSCENDENTAL_DEPTH) return {};
650
651 SolveOptions opts;
652 int max_roots = opts.max_roots;
653
654 auto lambert_pat = decompose_lambert_w_pattern(expr, var);
655 if (lambert_pat) {
656 auto inverted = invert_lambert_w(lambert_pat->rhs);
657 if (inverted.empty()) return {};
658
659 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
660 for (auto& val : inverted) {
661 auto inner_solutions = solve_inner_equation(lambert_pat->inner, val, var, depth);
662 results.insert(results.end(), inner_solutions.begin(), inner_solutions.end());
663 }
664 return results;
665 }
666
667 auto exp_base_pat = decompose_exp_base_pattern(expr, var);
668 if (exp_base_pat) {
669 auto inverted = invert_exp_base(exp_base_pat->base, exp_base_pat->rhs);
670 if (inverted.empty()) return {};
671
672 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
673 for (auto& val : inverted) {
674 auto inner_solutions = solve_inner_equation(exp_base_pat->inner, val, var, depth);
675 results.insert(results.end(), inner_solutions.begin(), inner_solutions.end());
676 }
677 return results;
678 }
679
680 auto pattern = decompose_trig_exp_pattern(expr, var);
681 if (pattern) {
682 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> inverted;
683
684 switch (pattern->func_type) {
685 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Sin:
686 inverted = invert_sin(pattern->rhs, max_roots);
687 break;
688 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Cos:
689 inverted = invert_cos(pattern->rhs, max_roots);
690 break;
691 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Tan:
692 inverted = invert_tan(pattern->rhs, max_roots);
693 break;
694 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Exp:
695 inverted = invert_exp(pattern->rhs);
696 break;
697 case FunctionNode::FuncType::Ln:
698 inverted = invert_ln(pattern->rhs);
699 break;
700 default:
701 return {};
702 }
703
704 if (inverted.empty()) return {};
705
706 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
707 for (auto& val : inverted) {
708 auto inner_solutions = solve_inner_equation(pattern->inner, val, var, depth);
709 results.insert(results.end(), inner_solutions.begin(), inner_solutions.end());
710 }
711 return results;
712 }
713
714 auto subst = detect_substitution(expr, var);
715 if (subst) {
716
717 auto u_solutions = SymbolicExpr::solve(subst->poly_in_u, subst->u_var);
718 if (u_solutions.empty()) return {};
719
720 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> results;
721 for (auto& u_root : u_solutions) {
722
723 auto x_values = invert_substitution_h(subst->u_expr, u_root, var);
724 results.insert(results.end(), x_values.begin(), x_values.end());
725 }
726 return results;
727 }
728
729 return {};
730}

◆ solve_with_assumptions()

std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::solve_with_assumptions ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > &  equation,
const std::string &  variable,
const AssumptionContext *  ctx = nullptr 
)

Solve an equation with assumption-based domain filtering.

Calls the existing SymbolicExpr::solve() to compute all solutions, then applies domain filtering based on the variable's declared domain in the AssumptionContext. Solutions that violate the domain constraint are excluded.

Domain filtering rules:

  • Real: exclude solutions containing sqrt(-1) or non-real numeric values
  • PositiveInt: exclude non-integer or <= 0 solutions
  • NonNegative (Natural): exclude solutions evaluating to < 0
参数
equationThe equation to solve (equal to zero, or RelationalNode)
variableThe variable name to solve for
ctxOptional assumption context; if nullptr, all solutions returned unfiltered
返回
Filtered solutions preserving original order

在文件 solver.cpp 第 1673 行定义.

1677{
1678 // Step 1: Compute all solutions using the existing solver
1679 auto all_solutions = SymbolicExpr::solve(
1680 std::const_pointer_cast<SymbolicExpr>(equation), variable);
1681
1682 // Step 2: If no context provided, return all solutions unfiltered
1683 if (!ctx) {
1684 return all_solutions;
1685 }
1686
1687 // Step 3: Get the domain for the variable from the context
1688 Domain domain = ctx->get_domain(variable);
1689
1690 // Step 4: Apply domain filtering as post-processing
1691 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> filtered;
1692 filtered.reserve(all_solutions.size());
1693
1694 // Check if we have any sign constraints to apply
1695 bool has_sign_constraint = ctx->has_sign(variable, Sign::NonNegative) ||
1696 ctx->has_sign(variable, Sign::Positive) ||
1697 ctx->has_sign(variable, Sign::Negative) ||
1698 ctx->has_sign(variable, Sign::NonPositive);
1699
1700 // If domain is Complex (default/no restriction) and no sign constraints, return all
1701 if (domain == Domain::Complex && !has_sign_constraint) {
1702 return all_solutions;
1703 }
1704
1705 for (const auto& sol : all_solutions) {
1706 if (!sol) continue;
1707
1708 bool exclude = false;
1709
1710 // --- Real domain filter ---
1711 // Exclude solutions containing imaginary components
1712 if (domain == Domain::Real || domain == Domain::Rational ||
1713 domain == Domain::Integer || domain == Domain::Natural ||
1714 domain == Domain::PositiveInt) {
1715 if (contains_imaginary(sol)) {
1716 exclude = true;
1717 }
1718 }
1719
1720 if (!exclude) {
1721 double numeric_val = 0.0;
1722 bool is_numeric = try_get_numeric_value(sol, numeric_val);
1723
1724 // --- Integer domain filter ---
1725 // Exclude non-integer numeric solutions
1726 if (domain == Domain::Integer || domain == Domain::Natural ||
1727 domain == Domain::PositiveInt) {
1728 if (is_numeric && !is_integer_value(numeric_val)) {
1729 exclude = true;
1730 }
1731 }
1732
1733 // --- Natural domain filter (non-negative integers) ---
1734 // Exclude negative solutions
1735 if (!exclude && (domain == Domain::Natural || domain == Domain::PositiveInt)) {
1736 if (is_numeric && numeric_val < 0.0) {
1737 exclude = true;
1738 }
1739 }
1740
1741 // --- PositiveInt domain filter ---
1742 // Exclude zero and negative solutions
1743 if (!exclude && domain == Domain::PositiveInt) {
1744 if (is_numeric) {
1745 int eq;
1746 lmmc_double_nearly_equal(numeric_val, 0.0, &eq);
1747 if (eq || numeric_val <= 0.0) {
1748 exclude = true;
1749 }
1750 }
1751 }
1752
1753 // --- NonNegative sign check (for Real domain with NonNegative sign) ---
1754 // Check if the variable has NonNegative sign assumption
1755 if (!exclude && is_numeric) {
1756 if (ctx->has_sign(variable, Sign::NonNegative) && numeric_val < 0.0) {
1757 exclude = true;
1758 }
1759 if (ctx->has_sign(variable, Sign::Positive)) {
1760 int eq;
1761 lmmc_double_nearly_equal(numeric_val, 0.0, &eq);
1762 if (eq || numeric_val <= 0.0) {
1763 exclude = true;
1764 }
1765 }
1766 if (ctx->has_sign(variable, Sign::Negative) && numeric_val >= 0.0) {
1767 exclude = true;
1768 }
1769 if (ctx->has_sign(variable, Sign::NonPositive) && numeric_val > 0.0) {
1770 exclude = true;
1771 }
1772 }
1773 }
1774
1775 if (!exclude) {
1776 filtered.push_back(sol);
1777 }
1778 }
1779
1780 return filtered;
1781}

◆ sort_roots_by_convention()

static std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > lamina::sort_roots_by_convention ( const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > &  roots)
static

在文件 root_of_utils.cpp 第 321 行定义.

323{
324 if (roots.empty()) return roots;
325
326 std::vector<RootWithIndex> evaluated;
327 evaluated.reserve(roots.size());
328
329 bool all_evaluated = true;
330 for (const auto& root : roots) {
331 RootWithIndex ri;
332 ri.expr = root;
333 auto [val, success] = try_eval_complex(root);
334 ri.eval_success = success;
335 if (success) {
336 ri.real_part = val.real();
337 ri.imag_part = val.imag();
338
339 ri.is_real = (std::abs(ri.imag_part) < 1e-10);
340 } else {
341 all_evaluated = false;
342 ri.real_part = 0.0;
343 ri.imag_part = 0.0;
344 ri.is_real = true;
345 }
346 evaluated.push_back(ri);
347 }
348
349 if (!all_evaluated) {
350 return roots;
351 }
352
353 std::vector<RootWithIndex> real_roots;
354 std::vector<RootWithIndex> complex_roots;
355
356 for (auto& ri : evaluated) {
357 if (ri.is_real) {
358 real_roots.push_back(ri);
359 } else {
360 complex_roots.push_back(ri);
361 }
362 }
363
364 std::sort(real_roots.begin(), real_roots.end(),
365 [](const RootWithIndex& a, const RootWithIndex& b) {
366 return a.real_part < b.real_part;
367 });
368
369 std::sort(complex_roots.begin(), complex_roots.end(),
370 [](const RootWithIndex& a, const RootWithIndex& b) {
371 if (std::abs(a.real_part - b.real_part) > 1e-10) {
372 return a.real_part < b.real_part;
373 }
374
375 return a.imag_part > b.imag_part;
376 });
377
378 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> sorted;
379 sorted.reserve(roots.size());
380 for (const auto& ri : real_roots) {
381 sorted.push_back(ri.expr);
382 }
383 for (const auto& ri : complex_roots) {
384 sorted.push_back(ri.expr);
385 }
386
387 return sorted;
388}

◆ square_free_factorization()

std::vector< std::pair< Polynomial< Rational >, int > > lamina::square_free_factorization ( const Polynomial< Rational > &  poly)

对有理系数多项式进行无平方因子分解。

参数
poly有理系数多项式
返回
因子与重数的列表

在文件 solve_polynomial.cpp 第 607 行定义.

608 {
609
610 std::vector<std::pair<Polynomial<Rational>, int>> factors;
611
612 if (poly.is_zero() || poly.degree() <= 0) {
613 return factors;
614 }
615
616 Polynomial<Rational> f = poly.make_monic();
617
618 if (f.degree() == 1) {
619 factors.push_back({f, 1});
620 return factors;
621 }
622
623 Polynomial<Rational> f_prime = f.differentiate();
624 Polynomial<Rational> g = Polynomial<Rational>::gcd(f, f_prime);
625
626 if (g.degree() <= 0) {
627 factors.push_back({f, 1});
628 return factors;
629 }
630
631 auto [w, w_rem] = f.div_mod(g);
632
633 int multiplicity = 1;
634
635 while (w.degree() > 0) {
636
637 Polynomial<Rational> y = Polynomial<Rational>::gcd(g, w);
638
639 auto [z, z_rem] = w.div_mod(y);
640
641 if (z.degree() > 0) {
642
643 factors.push_back({z.make_monic(), multiplicity});
644 }
645
646 auto [g_next, g_rem] = g.div_mod(y);
647 g = g_next;
648 w = y;
649 multiplicity++;
650 }
651
652 if (g.degree() > 0) {
653 factors.push_back({g.make_monic(), multiplicity});
654 }
655
656 return factors;
657}

◆ symbolic_poly_to_expr()

static std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > lamina::symbolic_poly_to_expr ( const Polynomial< SymbolicPolyCoeff > &  poly)
static

在文件 root_of_utils.cpp 第 11 行定义.

12 {
13 if (poly.is_zero()) return SymbolicExpr::number(0);
14
15 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr>> terms;
16 for (int i = poly.degree(); i >= 0; --i) {
17 const auto& coeff = poly.coeffs[i];
18 if (coeff == SymbolicPolyCoeff(0)) continue;
19
20 auto coeff_expr = coeff.val;
21 if (i == 0) {
22 terms.push_back(coeff_expr);
23 } else {
24 auto var_expr = SymbolicExpr::variable(poly.variable_name);
25 std::shared_ptr<SymbolicExpr> var_part;
26 if (i == 1) {
27 var_part = var_expr;
28 } else {
29 var_part = SymbolicExpr::power(var_expr, SymbolicExpr::number(i));
30 }
31
32 if (coeff_expr->is_one()) {
33 terms.push_back(var_part);
34 } else {
35 terms.push_back(SymbolicExpr::multiply(coeff_expr, var_part));
36 }
37 }
38 }
39
40 if (terms.empty()) return SymbolicExpr::number(0);
41 if (terms.size() == 1) return terms[0];
42
43 auto result = terms[0];
44 for (size_t i = 1; i < terms.size(); ++i) {
45 result = SymbolicExpr::add(result, terms[i]);
46 }
47 return result;
48}

◆ symbolic_to_poly_recursive()

template<typename T >
Polynomial< T > lamina::symbolic_to_poly_recursive ( const std::shared_ptr< SymbolicNode > &  node,
const std::string &  var 
)

递归地将符号节点转换为一元多项式

模板参数
T系数类型
参数
node符号节点
var主变量名
返回
对应的一元多项式

在文件 poly_utils.hpp 第 227 行定义.

227 {
228 if (!node) return Polynomial<T>(var);
229
230 if (!depends_on_var(node, var)) {
231 return Polynomial<T>({extract_coeff_value<T>(std::make_shared<SymbolicExpr>(node))}, var);
232 }
233
234 if (auto v = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<VariableNode>(node)) {
235 if (v->name == var) {
236 return Polynomial<T>({T(0), T(1)}, var);
237 }
238 }
239
240 if (auto add = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<AddNode>(node)) {
241 Polynomial<T> res(var);
242 for (auto& op : add->operands) {
243 res = res + symbolic_to_poly_recursive<T>(op, var);
244 }
245 return res;
246 }
247
248 if (auto mul = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<MultiplyNode>(node)) {
249 Polynomial<T> res({T(1)}, var);
250 for (auto& op : mul->operands) {
251 res = res * symbolic_to_poly_recursive<T>(op, var);
252 }
253 return res;
254 }
255
256 if (auto pow = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<PowerNode>(node)) {
257 if (auto exp_num = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(pow->exponent)) {
258 // 只有指数能确认为非负整数时才走幂展开；否则保持表达式不展开，
259 // 避免 x^(1/2) / x^(-1) 这种被强转 (int) 后被错误展开成 x^0=1 之类。
260 bool is_nonneg_int = false;
261 int e_val = 0;
262
263 if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(exp_num->value)) {
264 const auto& bi = std::get<BigInt>(exp_num->value);
265 if (!bi.IsNegative()) {
266 int v = bi.to_int();
267 // 多项式幂展开会按指数次方做矩阵幂运算，过大时直接放弃。
268 if (v >= 0 && v < 1000) {
269 is_nonneg_int = true;
270 e_val = v;
271 }
272 }
273 } else if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(exp_num->value)) {
274 const auto& r = std::get<Rational>(exp_num->value);
275 if (r.is_integer()) {
276 BigInt bi = r.to_BigInt();
277 if (!bi.IsNegative()) {
278 int v = bi.to_int();
279 if (v >= 0 && v < 1000) {
280 is_nonneg_int = true;
281 e_val = v;
282 }
283 }
284 }
285 } else if (std::holds_alternative<lmmc_real_t>(exp_num->value)) {
286 lmmc_real_t d = std::get<lmmc_real_t>(exp_num->value);
287 // 只有当 double 严格等于其取整值且为非负时，才视为整数指数。
288 if (std::isfinite(d) && d >= 0 && d < 1000.0 &&
289 d == std::floor(d)) {
290 is_nonneg_int = true;
291 e_val = static_cast<int>(d);
292 }
293 }
294
295 if (is_nonneg_int) {
296 if (e_val == 0) return Polynomial<T>({T(1)}, var);
297 auto base_poly = symbolic_to_poly_recursive<T>(pow->base, var);
298 Polynomial<T> res({T(1)}, var);
299 for (int i = 0; i < e_val; ++i) res = res * base_poly;
300 return res;
301 }
302 }
303 }
304
305 return Polynomial<T>(var);
306}

在文件 root_of_utils.cpp 第 96 行定义.

99{
100 out_poly = Polynomial<Rational>(sym_poly.variable_name);
101 out_poly.coeffs.resize(sym_poly.coeffs.size(), Rational(0));
102
103 for (size_t i = 0; i < sym_poly.coeffs.size(); ++i) {
104 auto coeff_expr = sym_poly.coeffs[i].val;
105 if (!coeff_expr) {
106 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational(0);
107 continue;
108 }
109
110 auto simplified = coeff_expr->simplify();
111
112 if (expr_has_free_variables(simplified->root)) {
113 return false;
114 }
115
116 if (auto num_node = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<NumberNode>(simplified->root)) {
117 if (std::holds_alternative<Rational>(num_node->value)) {
118 out_poly.coeffs[i] = std::get<Rational>(num_node->value);
119 } else if (std::holds_alternative<BigInt>(num_node->value)) {
120 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational(std::get<BigInt>(num_node->value));
121 } else {
122
123 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational::from_double(std::get<lmmc_real_t>(num_node->value));
124 }
125 } else {
126
127 lmmc_real_t val = simplified->to_numeric();
128 if (std::isnan(val) || std::isinf(val)) {
129 return false;
130 }
131 out_poly.coeffs[i] = Rational::from_double(val);
132 }
133 }
134
135 out_poly.trim();
136 return true;
137}

在文件 solve_transcendental.cpp 第 33 行定义.

33 {
34 if (!expr || !expr->root) return false;
35
36 struct VarChecker : public SymbolicVisitor {
37 bool has_var = false;
38 void visit(NumberNode&) override {}
39 void visit(VariableNode&) override { has_var = true; }
40 void visit(AddNode& n) override { for (auto& op : n.operands) { if (has_var) return; op->accept(*this); } }
41 void visit(MultiplyNode& n) override { for (auto& op : n.operands) { if (has_var) return; op->accept(*this); } }
42 void visit(PowerNode& n) override { n.base->accept(*this); if (!has_var) n.exponent->accept(*this); }
43 void visit(FunctionNode& n) override { for (auto& arg : n.arguments) { if (has_var) return; arg->accept(*this); } }
44 void visit(MatrixNode&) override {}
45 } checker;
46 expr->root->accept(checker);
47 if (checker.has_var) return false;
48
49 out = expr->to_numeric();
50 return true;
51}

引用了 FunctionNode::arguments, PowerNode::base, PowerNode::exponent, AddNode::operands , 以及 MultiplyNode::operands.

◆ vector_angle()

double lamina::vector_angle ( const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > &  a,
const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< SymbolicExpr > > &  b 
)

计算两个向量的夹角（弧度）

参数
a向量 a 的各分量
b向量 b 的各分量
返回
夹角的数值（弧度）

在文件 symbolic_vector_geometry.cpp 第 37 行定义.

40 {
41
42 if (a.size() != b.size() || a.empty()) {
43 return std::numeric_limits<double>::quiet_NaN();
44 }
45
46 double norm_a = 0, norm_b = 0, dot = 0;
47 bool numeric = true;
48 for (size_t i = 0; i < a.size(); ++i) {
49 if (!a[i]->is_number() || !b[i]->is_number()) {
50 numeric = false;
51 break;
52 }
53 auto na_var = a[i]->get_number_value();
54 auto nb_var = b[i]->get_number_value();
55
56 auto to_double = [](const auto& v) -> double {
57 using T = std::decay_t<decltype(v)>;
58 if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, int>) return static_cast<double>(v);
59 else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, BigInt>) return v.to_double();
60 else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, Rational>) return v.to_double();
61 else return 0.0;
62 };
63 double na = std::visit(to_double, na_var);
64 double nb = std::visit(to_double, nb_var);
65 norm_a += na * na;
66 norm_b += nb * nb;
67 dot += na * nb;
68 }
69 if (!numeric) return std::numeric_limits<double>::quiet_NaN();
70 if (norm_a == 0.0 || norm_b == 0.0) {
71 return std::numeric_limits<double>::quiet_NaN();
72 }
73 double cosv = dot / (std::sqrt(norm_a) * std::sqrt(norm_b));
74 // Clamp into [-1, 1] to avoid std::acos domain errors caused by rounding.
75 if (cosv > 1.0) cosv = 1.0;
76 else if (cosv < -1.0) cosv = -1.0;
77 return std::acos(cosv);
78}

34 return {x, y, z};

11 {
12 auto pi = SymbolicExpr::number(M_PI);
13 auto integrand = SymbolicExpr::multiply(pi, SymbolicExpr::power(fx, SymbolicExpr::number(2)));
14 auto integral = integrand->integrate("x");
15 auto upper = integral->substitute("x", b);
16 auto lower = integral->substitute("x", a);
17 return SymbolicExpr::add(upper, SymbolicExpr::multiply(SymbolicExpr::number(-1), lower));
18}
